playStoreReviews.text: I can't believe this app has such a high rating. For 5.99/month you can send a WHOPPING 2 Invoices per month!!! For 9.99/month, they let you send 3 more! Isn't the whole point to send invoices? You literally pay money so you can type in numbers and fill out all of the information and email it. I can do that on a spreadsheet!!! I can't believe I wasted my time getting the app set up. Onward to my Neverending journey to find a good invoicing program.

I would like the terms and conditions to be on the back of each page. I would also like the ability for the customer to accept the terms and conditions I.E. a check box that says they agree to terms and conditions. It would be nice to be able to increase the font size, some older customers cannot read the size that it is. I would like the ability to select different kinds of work orders, one the way it currently is, one for check and service that has fields I can edit for whatever check I'm doing that will stay saved. Then I simply check off the tasks. Other than that it's almost as good as it used to be when I purchased the app originally, before we had to buy it each year.

I've been using this app since I started my business. It was good (affordable) at the beginning until they started raising the praise every year for subscription renewal. Now all of the sudden I can't even create an invoice if I don't subscribe for their advanced plan type. Very disappointed, I was use to their software for the past feel years and now I had to start with a different one from the beginning.

They've wasted a lot of my time. I have to be so careful in the way I write up my estimates or else it'll just get erased out of no where as I'm creating them. It's pathetic that they won't take the time to figure out an auto save feature that works when i know im not the only one having this issue. For example: if I am in the middle of a large line item and I need to leave the page momentarily to look up some material cost or something, I come back to find it's all been erased. FIX IT!!

Horrible Customer Service. Have had nothing but problems with this app but nothing has been resolved. They sent my money to a closed account and after promising that a new payment will be reissued to the correct account within 3 days, they have now refused to fix the problem they caused. The app itself isn't bad but if anything comes up and you need assistance, good luck with that!!

Have been with this software since 2015 Over time they keep doing "Improvements" that wist my time and cost me more money. 1: came up with saving ITEMS. for auto fill purposes. this feature does not work for me, submitted several requests to remove/disable this feature. 2 years later they made auto save optional, but now i have 1000 items saved that randomly pop up when i type new invoices. Tried to delete all the items, but no, I can only do 10 at a time, 45 min latter, don't see the end of the item list and typing this review. Over the years, invoice2go capt coming up with ways to milk more money out of the clients. -cap number of customers (pay more if you want to store more) -want to talk to a human-upgrade your plan -offer me loans and financing -make their own CC processing-that overcharges 3.5% and doesn't care about us, people who pay them. I never write reviews and sick of writing this one, just stay away from them, they don't care about you, they just looking to come up with new ways to get more money from hard working professionals.

Been using this for a few years now and would love to keep using it but the new price increase turns me off. I'm a one person business and don't need a lot of the bells and whistles. Just basic invoicing and product saving. Wish they had a smaller package with say 250 invoices. $240 a year for the most basic one. I paid 99 last time. I'll probably go to wave. Not as good but it's free. If you want to pay this is a great service though.

I have used this app for several years now. They just completely changed it and I can no longer edit invoices, use it in landscape and it is very difficult to use compared to the previous version which I loved.....too bad. I will not be renewing my subscription. 2019 update. I have just finished my move to Wave, they are FREE and does exactly what I need. This app seems to want to compete with QuickBooks and never will. I have that already. They are way over priced. Go with Wave, MUCH BETTER!

Always room for improvement Do like the app ,been using for a few years now. Like the option for pay online for customers but don't like the fact the options are automatically turned for the customers to see , in turn, basically forced me to sign up for it. Sure I could have refused an wait over a week longer to get my money. There reasons I didn't activate the feature before hand is , I already have credit card processing with my bank which don't charge as much.

I used invoice2go for nearly 2 years and in july I found out I could accept ach/debit card payments for my small business and set it up, was approved, and started taking payments. Out of the blue they froze my account and said they needed more documents for "onboarding." I asked to have my account closed and they claimed they'd send me a check within 30 days. It has been 4 months and I still haven't recieved my money. I'm far from the only one. Look up their BBB reviews and DONT use them!!!!

Really like the app. Easy to use. Even have had customer's say how they like it and some who run small business started using it too. The only thing is for a small business like myself, it's a little pricey. All small business trys to keep their overhead as low as possible. Invoice2go, please run a special like last year so i could continue to use. Thanks

Was a good app a couple years ago when I started using it. Now they've raised the prices on everything and if I have customers pay using the app, it takes 5-6 days to see the money. They receive the funds then sit on them for days without explanation. So tired of being charged unnecessary fees, as a small business owner it's crucial I'm paid quickly.

I had a client pay with a credit card but I had my old account linked. I linked my new one and the money still hasn't hit my bank account, not to mention they charge 3.0% and when you select the refund payment option it tells you that it's subject to additional processing fees... I don't recommend using the app and accepting card payments through the app.

This review is for the customer service they provide. I like the app and format. I had an employee change the phone number to the Invoice2go account. I don't know how that was ever approved as I keep failing at changing it back, do to verification. I've opened 2 help tickets on this in the last 3 weeks. And it's still not resolved. Customer service doesn't respond to emails in a timely manner. They failed at stopping the wrong person from changing account info.

Have used this software 5-6 years for my construction business. Very quick, easy to use, and professional looking. The extra features are nice as well. Excellent estimate/invoice software. The ONLY thing I would change, is the price. I've been a long time customer and have seen the program grow, but for a while I watched the pricendrast increase over the years and it's a little more than I'd like to pay. My annual subscription should be ending anytime now and I think I might do a little looking

Tried for 7 years to master Quickbooks. Could not make it a simple comfortable process to create proposals and invoices. It was drudgery. It has taken me about 21 days to be able to make proposals and invoices immediately. Use the custom forms, they are worth the time invested. Clients love the "on-the-spot" communications. Begin with the Pro version you will have no regrets.

The was a must for out in the field services. My phone is a Note 20 Ultra on Sprint network. One draw back is that the app expires in one year. It's a yearly subscription. Kinda of expensive. 7/11 update. Not liking the new update. Lots of changes to the app. And not in a good way. Been using the app for over 5 years. The original app was better IMO. For several reasons. 5/24/21

This app was amazing when I first started using it 3 years ago. I found it to be simple to use yet very effective. After this abortion of an update a couple days ago everything went south real quick. I understand and accept change, but this kind of change is not helping. Creating  invoices is really bad now. How can I manually enter and separate parts and labor, the option is not there! If I press on "add items" it drops down not only my inventory list but everything in my expenses list and then includes an attachment of my distributors paid invoices!! Makes no sense.  I absolutely hate the way  the reports function now, the graphs are gone, entering expenses is awkward...entering information on expenses takes longer now actually.  Why get rid of the merchants drop down list? Now I have  to constantly input them in manually every time...annoying. The camera function for expenses doesn't let you crop you receipts anymore . There are a few other things that I am not thrilled with. Unfortunately it's time to move on to a new app...should of left it alone!!

Very convenient and easy to use. I wish there was a way to do line item credits. I'm an electrician, and I get a service agreement ahead of time based on an estimate. Then when it's time to send the bill after completion, I simply copy from estimate to invoice. But by the time I do the work, some things have changed. So I have to go back and remove those line items I didn't do, and add any extras Right now I'm still doing work with pen and paper to show how the final price changed

Updating my review for 2020. This app has changed the way I do business for the better. It is easy to use, quick, and looks professional to the customer. (Not to mention that now I get paid much faster, and I can enter how an invoice was paid). I highly recommend Invoice2go to any small business owner. Just wish there was a place to indicate how a payment was made, ie: by check #, cash, or credit

Once I took the time to customize it to our needs and then practiced using it it is becoming easier and easier. It's going really well so far, I'm using the enterprise level already and I'm only 3 days in. The app works great. I'm really glad I decided to try it. We still love the system. We have not been able to get Invoice2Go to help our customer info to be able to be put into traditional fields to be mailer friendly. We want to use our customer database to be able to do mailings.

This program was great and simple for a good price, but now they charge everything including charging the price from $99 a year for unlimited invoices and estimates to $407.89 a year for the same unlimited invoices and estimates, and yes they include other services, but they are not worth the new price, is sad because was a good product, I just to recommend it to my friends contractors, now all of us are just finishing the year to move to other app because this one is no longer worth it.

Love this app and I recommend it to anyone who would need it. The one disclaimer I throw in now is using customer support now takes skill and patience to get through the automated service. The fact that 2fa security can be sent to the registered email instead of the phone number is also a risky situation imho. All in all this is a great app that I've used for over 10 years to easily and reliably get paid from my customers. Taking credit card payment continues to add extra value as well

Greed, Lies, and xpensive I used to use this app when prices were reasonable and for about a year I stopped using it. I needed an I voice app so I decided to try this app agian. When I logged in it gave me an option to pay $9.99 unlimited. Now let me tell you on my computer it had a diffrent price which was showing up higher but for some reason the app still had $9.99 price so I chose it and then I see that they charged me 39.99$ for there service every month total rip off immediately I canceled

Darn near perfect app for me..made things so easy and simple, had for 2 years, but then they.raised my price by a lot, so I uninstalled instead of renewing. Then recently offered me even a lower price than before just bad business tactics in my book. Seems being a good paying customer had no benefit in this situation, but maybe it was just a fluke havn't read any other reviews, but maybe I should.

a price increase to keep the features i already had? no thanks, no one is going to pay $400 a year for invoicing when other apps offer all the same features with unlimited invoices, estimates and customers for around $6 a month, not $34. Speaking of by the month rates, you say its $34 a month for your best plan but dont even offer monthly installments, all has to be lump sum up front. I used to love this app but im going to use something else.

I think the app itself has great content, and really allows the small business owner to look professional and offers great customization. However be aware of the stripe payment system that is works with. I had two clients use their cards to make payments, and after a week of waiting for my money, they just closed my account. Their customer service was terrible as well. All in all if this app had another platform for card charges I think it would be a great app.

All I can ask for I have used this app for a few years now to do all my invoicing. It does everything I need it to do and a lot of stuff I don't. My only complaint, is that sometimes when filling out job info, it will occasionally swap two lines around or delete one. It's easy to fix, but can be an annoying pain. Other than that, zero complaints.

This is so much better then what I was doing before. Invoicing and Estimates from my phone or computer, but mostly my phone, is everything everything that I hoped for. I no longer have to wait to get back to my office to invoice. This saves me so much time. I love it! Update 2/16/2021 I've been using this software for a few years now. It's very nice to see the continued support and updates that Invoice To Go has made to the software. It's more advanced than ever, but still simple to use.

2 stars because I really like the formatting and accessability, which is really unfortunate because I can't justify the cost of a reasonable invoice amount. I also noticed that the app wants me to pay nearly $400 a year for unlimited invoicing, when another person I know that uses the app pays nearly half the price for theirs. There's also no intermediate plan between Pro and Unlimited and a very significant price difference between the two, especially since I only need to send out around 10/mo.

Had some problems but app works as should. Use it for estimates and invoicing jobs. Edit:Had a phone update and the app has completely stop working. Can't access anything. Been a week with no answer of what is going on other than "update the app" or "uninstall/reinstall". About to jump ship and pay more for something that has more dependability.

If your using this in multiple locations as I do for work it doesnt always want to work. some times I have to wait 30-45 mins in order to get to input an estimate or invoice. The price for the first year is pretty reasonable but when you have to renew boy is it a hard pill to swallow for a small business. After you've used it for a year and dont want to loose all you estimates and invoice I guess they kinda make you buy it.

I bought this in 2012 . Paid ( as a purchase ) it worked great ! I get a notice NOT to update my app because my device is old .I turned off updates . Then, out of no where I can no longer email nor print from this app ( leaving it usless) I can't re install because the NEW version is a monthly subscription and I would have to pay a monthly fee ( I have already paid) but I would also loose all my data . I emailed a while back and basically , was told tough sht.

Used to be easy to send and receive payment. Now it's a money grab scheme where you have to use their banking system cards etc. You don't use their cc then your account becomes deactived even if you've paid for their service! I've been working with their customer service for 2 weeks with no actual progress to reinstate my account so I'm dropping the service. Update: Bill read to the bottom I've been talking to customer service for 2 weeks to activate my account and it's still not active.

Downloaded this app and got a free trial for 30 days on the professional plan. Initially, it did not say the invoices were limited and after 5 completed, the system said I had to upgrade to the premium plan and be charged immediately. I did this for $39.99 plus tax and now it will not let me back into the site on my android nor will it recognize the payment I made. I would not refer any business professional to this site it's useless and I need my money back!

I've been trying to get them to approve my EIN for months because they decided to move away from Stripe to their own credit card processing. After weeks of trying to get my EIN document approved, I give up and canceled my subscription, which was the unlimited package for $399/yr. I will now just send my clients payment links through stripe, and get rid of this app completely after using it for a couple of years. It's a shame because it was easy to use, but greed got the best of them.

I've tried several invoice apps. Subscribed to 3. " Simple Invoice" worked the best for mle. Layout, my logo, the reminders-aweesome. Need to reach out to Support figure outt why it went non functional. I went ahead and subscribed to two other invoice apps because I need an invoices! Forget it they're not as good as this one. Send one email no response I'll send another one but I recommend it when it works.

I have contacted your support about 60 times got nowhere..This app is the worst you cant talk to anyone ever since the upgrade. I have lost $1000.00 through swipe that i never set up and nobody can seem to help it has become the worst invoice app on the market . I have used this app for years and its gone to the wort invoice app dont download it there is no one you can talk to

Be very, very careful with deleting anything in this app because they have absolutely no backup and can not restore anything. After seeing duplicate invoices paid and the total paid showing double the amount we deleted the duplicates and low and behold it deleted both. Now we have no records in Invoice2Go From the beginning of the year till June. So now what? They say we can only recreate the invoice. What? Time to find an alternative!

I have had invoice2go for many years and paying $425.99 for unlimited yearly services using just the invoice side. Then I decided to sign up for credit cards to be accepted and they required all these personal documents that most people don't ask for when I didn't get my IRS EIN letter to them in 3 days they shut my entire account down to where I can't access even past invoices that are due to get paid by check. You also can not call and talk to a live person. It's either chat or email.

All in all this is a great app! It has everything I need to keep my finances and tax records in place and super easy to maneuver. I can connect it to my business account and have my business cash flow running smoothly. Although I do think that first time users should get a heads up as to when they will receive their payments when they first start using the app, it can be a little confusing and frustrating if they don't. Oher than that it's one of the best apps and I will continue to use it.

skyrocketing prices with no end in sight . Used this app for years but every year the price is doubling now they want 33 a month . I only do 200 invoices a year . just a warning when it expires you will be locked out of viewing any invoices or estimates. Before the big update a year and a half ago i liked the software and when it expired you still had access to invoices and estimates you had ,you just could not create anymore . All of your info is held hostage in there cloud now .

I've used the free version ofthis app on my tab for a year or two. It no longer did what I needed it to do, so I purchased the app for $9.99. Several years later the app changed to a cloud based app, and what I had purchased was no longer useful. Albeit the purchase price for the app was only 10 bucks, it should have still been available to those that had purchased it. Forget this subscription junk...

What isn't great is that the app only offers subscriptions to be paid with an annual fee. They say that the option to change payment terms is coded into the app ui, but was not present anywhere in the app. I have screenshots, and the only thing I see is "billed annually". When selecting any option, it goes straight to billing you the whole amount for the year.

It use to work good ,but now it keeps logging me out and I have to log in each time I want to use it. ( thats a new issue)The app keeps giving me a message I don't have internet connection even tough all my other apps have no issues connecting to internet at that time . So I'm changing my rating because the app seems to be getting worse and not better.

I've been using this simple to use invoice app for a few years and it consistently gets better. The only issue that I have is that sometimes it's glitchy and won't load but it instead gives me a message that I have no internet connection when I know that's not the case. Aside from that, I love the app. I pay for the premium plan which I think is about $240.00 per year and it's worth every penny. Just fix that bug with the internet connection and I won't have any complaints.

This program has worked extremely well for me, my only complaint us that if you'd have done a long detailed invoice and you get a phone call or something else takes you away from the program when you come back your long detailed invoice has been deleted without asking you. Extremely aggravating. I use this entirely on my phone.

The app has too many glitches I've got stuck and I have to restart it if I'm on it for more than 5 minutes it just stops and doesn't work anymore all that work top 10 in 5 minutes gets lost and I have to start all over again from the beginning it's very frustrating when you're sitting outside from the Sun have a 110f temperature. And once you enter all the information sometimes it doesn't save it and you go look for it you have to redo it all over again.

I have had invoice2go for a couple of years and paying $425.99 for unlimited yearly services using just the invoice side. Then I decided to sign up for credit cards to be accepted and they required all these personal documents that most people don't ask for when I didn't get my IRS EIN letter to them in 3 days they shut my entire account down to where I can't access even past invoices that are due to get paid by check. You also can not call and talk to a live person. It's either chat or email.

Works well mostly. I have had some instances where invoices disappear. I have been using for 6 years now. No dark mode which is still disappointing. On an invoice quantity is left of amount {which it should be} but on the create invoice window they switched amount to the left of quantity. Why? It's counter intuitive. Dark mode please.

Was really enjoying the app. However one day I noticed I hadnt received money in my bank from a customer that had paid. Turns out this company will only allow a transfer to your bank account of $50k per month. So if you do more invoicing than that you will constantly be behind on receiving your payment. Just a heads up

Good app for the most part, but even after saving constantly during inputting notes in the comment section, the app just decides to delete all notes that take time, effort, and thought to write. This has been happening for years and the only resolution I received from support is to uninstall and reinstall the app. This has robbed many hours of time and caused severe frusteration. I am in the advance plan and should not have these recurring issues for the price tag.

First the company was good 60$ a year . Then they started charging more and more for a invoice template. Now they want 3-400$ a year for a invoice template and to send the invoices. Not worth it for me. I found another invoice site that does unlimited invoices for 70$ a year. Plus after my subscription was over I'm not allowed to access my old invoices that I have already paid for

It is very helpful after finishing a job being able to send an invoice right then and there. It helps me track invoices and turn quotes into invoices. The reports are great as well. The only thing that annoys me is that there is a constant push to upgrade. What I have is just fine, if an upgrade is necessary I will most likely figure it out.

Paid for a subscription. After a few days I was locked out of my account and ask to verify my email. The email was misspelled so I could not verify email address. Could not get this issue resolved. But while trying to resolve issue I found out I'm being charged through my play account. I never authorized that, I used a debit card to pay for the subscription. So I had to do a stop payment with debit card, then cancel sub through play store as well. Also no way to get refund. I was ripped off.

Be careful very careful after using the software for over 5 years, they switched who they accept credit cards from the first week. Using this system it showed our customer and us bill was accepted and fully paid release the product the next day it said declined will transfer money back to your customer. over 20,000 we lost on this transaction. Going to be looking for alternative invoicing software. Tried to get a hold of tech support they send you to some call center in Philippines

The app has been very buggy lately, ever since the announcement of the price increase. I think the price increase of the starter plan being double is absolutely insane and the app now having bugs such as showing false overdue invoices until you open them, recorded payments either don't always show up, don't register or register twice. Over a month later I'm STILL having these problems and now I can't log in for some reason despite unblocking my account twice and resetting my password twice....

Be very careful. I have lost countless hours of written information on quotes and invoices. When I go to another app for information like expenses then return to Inv2go it just disapears. It has cost me money in misquoting and invoicing. Furthermore they have the audacity to increase the monthly subscription from 45 AUD to 70 AUD per month. Why??? I'm looking forward to a new app soon.

I've been using the app for about 6 months or so. it works ok. but there support bot is terrible. one of my invoice disappeared, wanted to ask them where I might look to get it back (I had minimized it to look up info, went back and it was gone. now the order of my invoices is missing 1. the bot was useless and gives you ABSOLUTELY no other way to contact a real person to get an answer. now they send me an email they're going to jack up my subscription from $20 dollars a month to $60. terrible!

I've had this app for a couple years now. I use the premium plan. Just cause it's a write off anyways. But I can honestly say I have to issues with any invoices I've sent. I would like to find out how to not send so many reminders to my clients though. It is on the edge of harassment. I'm sure there's a way to manage rhe reminders in the settings somewhere. Other than that it would be nice to be able to pause my subscription when I'm traveling abroad for a couple months at a time.

I’ve been using the app for approx 9 years now and, overall, it has worked very well. However, I’ve recently noticed that it’s been glitching more than usual. Specifically, I’ve set up several labels such as Quote Number, Purchase Order Number, Client Name, Site Address, etc. Lately, when I input the Quote Number, the app randomly deletes one of the other labels — usually the Purchase Order Number. I’ve checked and confirmed that the app is fully up to date.

No matter how many times I edit the comments section and save it, the comments revert back to the original version. This happens both on the app and the website. Also, when I send the invoice via computer it is never received so I always have to send via the app. This has been going on for months and is not good enough. Time to look for a different invoice provider. One star.

The App and website are "ok", but support is SHOCKING. They removed the support email facility from the App and now you need to talk to a BOT on the website. After multiple attempts you get to a human, who appears to talk to several people at once as VERY long pauses. Simple questions are too hard for them, and requests for assistance or features are ignored and customers are treated like a number. I leave them at the end of my contract and will pay much more, but IT CAN'T COME SOON ENOUGH.

Do not buy. Jesus do not buy! Want to send invoices to your computer? Nope can't do that. Well you can but it takes about 5 mins per invoice to Bluetooth it over App is not friendly and so annoying. Once your subscription ends you can no longer access your old invoices. So if you buy it once your stuck paying for it for a long time. If I could rate it as negative stars I would do that but 1 star is the lowest rating I can give

A agree with the last review. Been using this app for a while now, enjoyed it at first. Now it is bigger, signs me outfox no reason, keeps raising its prices and asking me to sign up and pay again. Subscription now instead of a yearly payment. No idea how they can justify an increase in pricing. I'll be moving on from this app.

Very Poor, recently contacted them to discuss why i have had payments from my bank account over the last 3 years and i did not notice, they said they could not connect the payments with any account and there was nothing they could do... clearly my account had expired but payments kept coming out, they need to update their system as all payments should be linked to an account they should be able to find

I am so annoyed with this app at the moment! my business has not been doing well the last year and I decided to close up shop. i did not renew my subscription as I am not trading anymore. Now the receiver of revenue want my records for the last few years and I cant access it. this is totally unacceptable! I paid my subscription and I have been a loyal customer for a long time. This is unacceptable! why is there not atleast a month to month option???? stay away from this (cr) app!

Well, i think the old version was a little bit easier to operate. I did preferred editing invoice at the view point and being able to see entire description of the product rather than just first two words. Thanks for being able to save products from invoice level. Please add VAT rate for each item or category of item. Thanks for all updates.

I am a business owner from Australia. It used to be really easy to unsubscribe from application. But now, when I am in browser settings or app settings, there is no option for to cancel subscription. more expensive plans, after I've been using for 7 years! i used to pay something like 100/year which was alright. now i find out I'm nearing my annual limit on the standard plan and it's only february. upgrading to 400 invoices for the year will cost 28/month. unlimited is 40+/month. c'mon! I'll change apps if this is the case. do something soon! don't just tell me your team can help me review what is the "best plan", it all involves a big increase in costs!

The "no internet connection" message despite having a very strong WIFI signal and data available happens a lot. be careful with this app!! i had it for 2 years, the price doubled in the first year, second year it doubled again . i decided enough was enough and moved to a free invoicing app that does exactly what this one does but remains free!! this app takes your money for a years worth of invoices, but then wont let you access the invoices you have paid for once your subscription is up!! so now i cant do a report for my tax return, unless i pay £240 to do so. more cheaper options for 1man bands needed!

Be careful with this app. Once you cancel the subscription, you can not access your sent invoices to view or print ect. They are basically held hostage unless you pay another months subscription. That goes for all of your previous invoices and estimates already sent, which is outrageous. They have 6 years of my information, which I can't access unless I pay each time I need to access the information on invoices or estimates.

I have been with Invoice2Go from the start of the company. The one feature that i would change would be the permanent text that is written when you emai an invoice. I would like the option to remove the text that says Thanks! It is really time consuming, after i have to make 10 invoices and go and delete that text. I am using Invoice2Go to save time, so this feature is unproductive. It is unnecessary & unprofessional to have this, at the bottom of my invoice. Please give the option to change.

I really loved this app until I got a notification that I had to subscribe for a further 400 Invoices at an exorbitant amount. I have been with this platform for over Three years and finally grew to know and understand it. The subscription was an auto renew!, which I was OK with, however, I did not read the fine print which says that basically you will pay a large amount for 200 invoices.  I was disappointed that there was no option to purchase more invoices as and when I required it, OR given an option that I would be able to subscribe to the new 400 invoices at a discounted amount, seeing though I had ALREADY paid for one subscription. @ future subscribers: make sure you read the fine print, make sure you understand what you are getting. You will basically be paying for usage of invoices and quotes only. @ I2G, Great concept! just got too expensive for me, with no alternatives. Keep the product real.

Tried it out, the paid version, because it had 4+ stars but it's garbage. I couldn't get it to work and tech support over 2 days (6 hours) could not help. Still have outstanding invoices out there because of it. Update. Since my post it seems they have worked out some bugs. Still only 3 starts because it's obvious not a smooth system and I've invested a full day's work now into errors that should not have been there.

Not happy that available invoices that can be sent out has dropped down to 100 per year. What small business/sole trader with no staff can operate with 100 invoices? I certainly can't! I can have upto 20 clients per month! This should be a minimum of 300 per year. This is the biggest down fall to middle package being decreased in invoices being able to be sent to a lousy 100 per year. I don't need all functions for 50$ a month! Nor the cost of it!

Terrible app and way way way overpriced for what it does and be careful they have you by the nuts once your setup because if you don't pay your membership fee you cannot view any of your business. I would suggest take the lowest membership and wein yourself and your business off it ASAP. There are enough free apps out there at the moment doing more or less the same thing. Happy hunting.

I have been using this app for 9 years, but have recently found it very annoying that it doesn't work in landscape mode on my new expensive tablet and keyboard which I hoped would make it easier typing out my quotes. Add to that, the dramatic price increases over the years since I started using it. Very disappointed to say the least

Yes, the same idea with all friends who gave comment here, it is very expensive application in my country - Viet Nam, we use another application for restaurant and invoice for unlimited, it is about 60$/year, with salary of citizen here is about 200-250$/month, it is very expensive for business shop to buy this, it is over budget for my business. I've been using this app for my business for probably about 8 years. It has progressively got more and more expensive and at the same time more buggy. Not interested in having to "upgrade my plan" for some thing I previously had and now have had taken away. This app started with a one off up front purchase that some how became a subscription model with limited number of invoices you can send based on the plan. As much as i like the app lay-out and menu, i am turning off by its hassle to disable auto subscription (renewal), you can't disable within the app, you can't disable it on a mobile device in desktop mode, the button for disable isn't there to do so, you "only" can do it on a Desktop PC. I hate when they do this kind of stuff, until then I will leave it a 2 stars. Don't even try to argue, i have proof on how it work.

Pricing is outrageous. I have been using this app for many years now and the pricing had always been worth it, but not its just gone too high. As a small business every penny counts toward keeping me going, this invoice app while good in a lot of ways just costs way too much. Price doubled in the last couple years. Im looking for another app now.

Decent app when working. Constant bugs and slow to fix them. Put the price up every year and offer less for the money. After 3 years this year was the final straw due to offering limited invoices for more money. Don't get sucked in, use a better known app with more support that won't try to squeeze a few more quid out of you every year.

Love this app. So easy to use. Has made my invoicing and paperwork so much easier! *Update* Been using this app for years now and happy with it though wish it was integrated with the ATO to make paperwork even easier. *Update 2* This app is getting pretty damn expensive now for what it offers. I'll be cancelling it before my next renewal and go with a platform that's not only cheaper but integrates with the ATO but also offers a much wider variety of options for accounting

Overall the app is pretty good. In terms of things I'd like to see, currently it is a hassle applying credit notes (balances) towards future invoices. Also, I may be mistaken, however, the avenue by which the credit note was created (e.g. prepayment for services by way of bank transfer) isn't able to be captured; only the amount of credit offered is noted.

I am using your app for 4 years now. I like it a lot. Started with like $100 for a year. But now if I want to continue the same way is going to be close to $500. You guys are just became the greediest app maker. Just check all your 1 star reviews. It's all from old customers who are upset with your new pricing. Unfortunately like those old customers I have to look for somewhere else. Good bye GREEDY Invoice2go!

I've been using this app for 5 years and have been happy with it, that being said, all I want is unlimited invoices, not all of the additional extras like financial reports. The app is not good enough to replace a proper business tool like Xero or other similar software but I still have to pay the exorbitant new costs just for the invoice limit that best suits me. I know that one customer doesn't matter but without a cheaper annual option I'll be forced to move on.

I'm a sole trader in disability support, I do multiple short shifts in a week, so the limited invoices per month is definite deal breaker, I dont make much revenue and cannot afford the more premium plans but the basic plan (which still costs a pretty penny) only allows 2 invoices per month. (they only told me this after I spent an hour filling in all the required information 🙄) if your small business only did a few big jobs in a month this app would be more suited to you.

am happy with this app as it saves me doing layouts and all the other stuff, only thing I have problems with is having to constantly log in and not being able to access the app as it keeps me logged out for about 12 hours atleast once a week and is starting to get annoying for more the reason I pay to do more then 5 summary quotes per week or month someone of that sort. other then that great app to use to save time and quote quickly

this app is awesome. have used the unlimited for several years and have had nothing but praise for how it is designed. unfortunately, I am retiring and will be canceling it soon. if your a small business, and invoice in the field, this is the answer to your needs.

EDIT: it's asking me to update the app, but the link leads to the app in the ator without the 'update' button... This has honestly made my life so much easier in helping me keep track of who has paid me. I keep having to adjust the cost to reflect the hourly rate multiplied by how many hours- tiny issue but it would be great to have it ironed out.

The app is very easy to use and navigate. Also... Fantastic customer service! I messed up my email address and couldn't verify it. The chat option on the app (Android) went through a few bot options before connecting me to a lovely lady that could fix my error quickly. Will recommend this app for invoicing to all in the future.

Easy to use app that lets you prepare invoices and do a few other expenses and income related tasks right from your phone. Excellent for professionals who are mobile and already use their phone as their office. It's only free for 14 days but the subscription cost and features scale with your business and even if you only have one client, the lowest price subscription easily pays for itself.

After using this app for 3 years I am Sick of it! The price is more than 2X the original price now. It's just not worth it anymore. I found a free app that's similar in less than 5 minutes! Please don't give me your Copy and Paste reply about how I can contact you to find a plan that suits my needs. I had one. Now it's too expensive! Like bottled water, same contents same result but more expensive than the tap. Good luck ITG your going to need it at this rate.

So I've been with invoice2go for several years. Good app. Would be nice to be able to break up an invoice into progress payments. I've been with them since 2015 when it was $49.99 per year. Now it's over $200 yes there's more features but overall not worth the money especially for a small seasonal business like mine. Cannot log in at all, can't contact support directly. I need to get into the app to check an invoice and send a new one. One device I have been logged out of and password won't work. I've been running my business on this app for almost 2 years now. Very good fast and convenient. However I have failed to activate the title feature for either my invoices or quotes. So they get delivered without the titles to identify what the invoice or quote is for. Please kindly help.

I've been using this app for years and never had an issue UNTIL NOW!! I have items that need added to my site, but the app updated on 8/16/24 and it hasn't worked right since! I've been using square for years and now recently in the past 2 months my tap to pay is having connectivity issues. I will be looking into a different pay system since their customer service cannot resolve this issue. It's costing extra money when I have to enter the credit card number in to get the payment processed

Terrible experience. If you are willing to choke down the price beyond using the free version be prepared for a clunky user interface, bugs. Saving the worst part for last, the support team. I have been back and forth on hold for 45 mins and they keep asking the same question over and over again. The answer is simple. I tried square kiosk, $50 a month and it wasnt for me. The application won't let me renew without it. Current phone call 48:53 minutes.

The most confusing pos system and app I've ever seen. There is absolutely no way to track your finances thru this app. Nothing lines up (sales, deposits, etc.) and it's impossible to know where all of my money is going. In the process of analyzing replacement pos systems. DO NOT USE SQUARE.

In the past couple of months this app has become completely unreliable. I have a compatible phone but it keeps telling me to connect hardware, reader failed to connect. I have done everything to try to get it to allow me to tap to pay, some days it works some days it doesn't. Uninstalling, reinstalling the app, logging in and out, turing on and off developer options, nothing seems to work. Until it does, and then later it doesn't.

Fees keep going up, and taking payments gets harder and harder. Tap to Pay on my Samsung phone keeps failing. Says can't connect to hardware or something. There are a lot of complaints for the same problem from others. FIX IT SQUARE!!!! So then I have to manually enter the card, which takes forever, and charges me a HIGHER fee! Fix your app!!!

Used to love square, now looking into switching. Their processing fees have gone up, the subscriptions are pricey, they still charge you the next month when you cancel a subscription. Everything with them is complicated. Not a happy customer, they charge me way more in fees than the 3% charge for the transaction fee. Id look at all options before choosing square. It's also hard to set up. They don't look out for business owners much.

Vendors can only be added on the computer. Some features not available on the phone. Since the phone and computer are used quite a bit when inventory is received,this can be a nuisance. Quickbooks is something used by our company. The 2 systems do not talk to one another and requires us to still use a spreadsheet internally. Overall it's a good system, but could be better.

Sales reports don't ever actually sync with the POS until after close of day. We've reached out to support multiple times and explained that the app shows 2 transactions when we've had 20. We asked if there are different settings we need to change to get this to work and they told us to uninstall and reinstall the app. We did that. It didn't work. They keep saying the same things but never actually fix the problem.

I love using Square. The only frustration I have is with the Format Updates. (I totally understand the need for Security Updates) Nothing is more embarrassing than opening up my App to take a payment from a customer and finding that things have changed and I'm lost, looking like it is my first time running someone's Credit Card!!

Was just on the phone over 30 minutes to get my free reader. Absolutely insane! If it's this stressful just setting up I'm worried about trying to use it daily. I had to go in circles with chat bot to even get the number for customer service & they really couldn't even tell me what the problem was. Probably have to use this service for the weekend but definitely looking for something better. VERY DISAPPOINTED!!

Used this pos for years and never had an issue. Suddenly, nearly daily, my tap to pay option keeps being taken away saying it failed to connect. I have tried a different phone, using Apple instead of Android and it doesn't matter. The only solution I have found so far is to forget device on page and then delete and reinstall the app. Incredibly frustrating to do all this while trying to operate a business. I tried to chat with customer service about it and the chat was ended with no response.

The app alone seems to be fine. However, I have had nothing but problems trying to attach readers. I have now had not one, but two contactless, chip readers work for only a single day, impacting sales, as well as a regular card reader that is now all of a sudden constantly crashing the app everytime it is inserted. I cannot keep spending money on readers to continue opporating my business, for them to only work for a day! Disappointing, to say the least!

Was ok prior to this new 3 step verification. No more just opening app plugging in reader and go. Now you have to jump through hoops to open it, or you can get a whopping 90 days before you gotta jump through hoops. Used this app for over 5 years. It never took that long to do a card payment...ridiculous! With their rates being some of the highest in the industry and now a complete inconvenience to use, I will be going elsewhere.

Absolutely horrible. I accepted a credit card payment as my first transaction and they froze my account. My account went from $1,114 to 0, with no transfer initiated to my bank. 5 days later and they keep telling me they need more information. But only after I call and ask what the problem is. They want 2 days to look it over after every upload. I've had to update information 7 times and the money is still missing!!

One problem after another. First the chip reader wouldn't connect. Then the app went offline so I couldn't even enter the customers card number manually (which would end up costing me more in fees). When I called the customer support line I got a message that said they were unavailable because they were offline, so try back later! Meanwhile the customer walked away and I lost hundreds of dollars in sales. Thanks for nothing Square!

I've been using this for three years(at the decision of my employer, not me), and it's been an awful experience. The reader constantly disconnecting at the most inconvenient times, and you may think that you can just quickly reconnect it and it's no big deal, right? Nope. Once it's been connected and subsequently disconnected(for some inexplicable reason), it won't reconnect to the phone until the device is forcefully "forgotten" in the app.

Have used this app for a while now, had no issues w/ it. But now the rates are changing & the old card reader won't read chip cards. So I've been having to manually enter cards, which I don't understand why that costs so much more than a swiped card. My business isn't big enough to warrant spending $50-$60 on a chip reader. Very disappointed that like every other company this one also has to get greedier & make things harder for the little businesses.

This was the absolute WORST financial app I've ever seen. I went through so much time and trouble to gather all the documents and verification they requested only AFTER I took payments and it was time to cash out. After sending everything over I got a message back saying they were canceling my account. I was in tears and stuck with the embarrassing task of returning payments and getting other forms. I lost sooooo much money messing with Square. I cannot warm people enough. Don't do it!!!

It normally works well, and the deposits are soon after the transactions. My complaints are that the card reader often does not actually read the card. When that happens, and I have to enter the card manually, they charge a higher rate. It's not my fault the card is not being read properly, I don't think I should have to pay extra. Also, it charges the same rate for debit cards as it does for credit. That's basically overcharging for debit card use.

I have so many issues with Square. Every time I try to take a payment, I have to cycle thru all of the different ways to accept a payment (swipe, tap, chip reader) at least twice before it finally works. IF IT WORKS. More often than not, I have to end up typing in the information because the readers aren't working. My clients have come to expect this level of difficulty so much that when it does go thru on the first try, they are all shocked that it actually worked.

For the last year I have had access to Instant Transfer. I got my first sale of the year today, went to transfer, and the option was no longer available. Called customer service. Their solution 'do more transactions' and the option will turn itself back on when the 'system shows I've done enough'. They couldn't tell me a number, when it was removed, why it was removed... Nothing. Just 'do more transactions'. Great advice! Not. Going to Shopify.

Customer service has automated responses. Despite entering my information correctly, I still got denied for cards. I can't deactivate my account becuase it was denied for cards. I have not had a positive experience with using this app. Going through the walkthrough, it actually counts that as a real transaction that can't be deleted. My account was denied even before I could enter bank information, but I entered everything in correctly multiple times. It eventually goes to no tries.

I like the app for the most part and the new savings account is a great idea. Unfortunately it doesn't allow for the transfer of cents into savings. This makes the tracking of my consignment sales vs. my own items a little more difficult. I like to park the consignment funds into a separate folder until payout. Have to round off. 8/17/22: The app still needs the capability of being able to transfer dollars AND CENTS... not just whole dollar amounts. I still have to use the website instead.

I really like the services of Square, but a few times I have lost sales because the card reader disconnected, or the app said it didn't have a network connection. These are issues with the app and reader, I confirmed my Bluetooth was on and the phone had internet access, and this happened on several devices in an identical way; an iPad, a Samsung Note 20 ultra, and an LG V30. But, when it works, it is really great :)

Used to be a great app. Now they force you to change your password every month, so if you have multiple registers/devices you will constantly be logged out of them. They also took the Google calendar sync feature and put it behind a pay wall. So now they want $29.99 a month for this one basic feature that I've been using for years. Oh and I can't even log in to sign up for the plan, because I don't remember what my monthly password change was.

Everything was great! I used the app with MagStrip reader MAYBE 2 weeks and suddenly, this week l tried and there wasnt an option for use. I've tried EVERY WHICH WAY to get a LIVE PERSON and not an automated system, and yet there must not be any humans that work here! They deactivated my account for no reason. No warning. No way to resolve any issues. And now my funds are on hold for 90 days and MAY NOT EVEN BE RELEASED IN FULL by the end of it. Not only frustrating, but also UNACCEPTABLE!

I have a small online beauty business that utilizes dropshipping. Basically, a customer places an order and a portion of the money is used to place the customer's order with my wholesaler. Lately, almost every time an order is placed Square does a so-called "periodic review" where they hold the funds & I am unable to access them. This is the 3rd time in less than 2 wks which is ridiculous considering Square didn't have to wait to get their cut off top. It's not even a massive amount of money!

After a few months of a deactivated account, I could not reach anyone and emails get a response once a day if that. Lack of customer support and seller support. Reviewing my account , has taken months, not being able to transfer my remaining funds is more of a bummer. As for the software, it does what it says and would recommend, it's the lack of communication between I and the humans behind it all.

Last update has been crazy buggy! App is constantly force closing in the middle of transactions. And for the love of GOD why can't I go back and add a tip after the transaction?! What a STUPID feature!!! I can't begin to tell you how many times clients hit the wrong button and then we have to do a whole new transaction. This is absurd. There should be a way to edit a tip and enter a tip after the transaction. I can do this on any and every merchant machine I've ever used except this thing.

Slowly losing interest....this week's "update" is much less user friendly for people like me who don't use a library and only use a phone for sales. The "update" has too many unnecessary steps to get from initial amount (which is ridiculously large) to total to process the charge. PLUS the total is so small I can barely see it. BRING BACK THE ONE STEP "CLEAR" TO CANCEL AN ENTRY. Some of us don't have a fancy iPad and that needs to be taken into consideration. The size of the font is too small

I have used Square for 7 years. I've been pleased with it until I was forced to buy a chip reader. This $50 chip reader is trash. It barely worked when I first got it & now that the app has updated, it does not work at all! And yes, I have tried every single suggestion. I am not buying another reader. My time in between clients is being taken up with me trying to get this to work then ultimately manually entering it. My clients are starting to use Venmo to pay me.

I as a small business thought that this would be a great option. I did my first transaction for a small amount but it went through. Everything went great. The money was put on my card, no issues. I did my second transaction which was significantly higher and all the sudden they want to do a verification and put my funds on hold for 2 days which was on a Friday. So of course it was all weekend as long I had already given the product to the person that made the purchase. Terrible service.

They claim its easy to use.. and it Is! Its easy to buy a reader, sign up for the service, attach your bank account and start taking payments. It tells you in the square dashboard that once your bank account is verified you can start taking payments. So once my account was verified I did. Here is where the problems start. I processed 3 payments totaling about $4500, then they had many questions for me, based on my answers they froze the account and are holding the money for 90 days. Awesome!

Was great.. at the beginning. I am a barber and I use the application a lot to get paid, but for about a month I have had a problem. once I pass the card, the application approves the transaction, the customer leaves but then the app freezes and ends up saying that there was an error and that the payment was not completed. I have lost a lot of money. I uninstalled it and reinstalled it but it's still the same. very bad

Completely useless to navigate and get through to a live agent without a custom code!!!! I don't recall ever receiving a "customer code" and there is no possible way to retrieve it. Went to PayPal excellent customer service, great sight and a very well known reputation. The card reader has both the chip reader and the chip reader contained in one piece, whereas square has two separate pieces...

BEWARE!!! IF you use headphones, if this app is on your phone, it will all of a sudden BLAST you way down in your ears with EXTREMELY LOUD static that is shocking, and I'm sure also damaging to your hearing, while you are listening to a meditation track or anything else. When it begins is completely unpredictable, which is even.worse. I will never reinstall that terrible app, and I am sure they know it is happening but do nothing. They also reserve the right to turn on your camera at any time.

RETAILERS BEWARE!!!!! DO NOT purchase the square point of sale system if you have over 50 items in your store. It does not perform basic retail tasks like Quickbooks. And if you need help they charge you for it after you just paid over $2000 for their system and you have to pay them monthly. It's a joke. The amount of hours we have put into this system and the inventory is still messing up for no reason at all. Stick with Quickbooks.

As an android user, this app is almost more trouble than it's worth. I have been making deliveries using this app for payment with the magstripe reader. However, unlike with apple phones, the android version will often freeze right after the customer picks a tip, leaving me standing awkwardly at their door asking them to wait while the app takes minutes (even up to four!) before I can have the customer sign and they can have their order. Sometimes it even freezes the phone and I have to restart

Generally a very good app. Easy to use. My only complaints are 1. The contactless chip reader is very persnickety. It's sometime difficult to pair, especially if it has been used with another device previously. Also, my brand new chip reader kept shutting down the app when we tried to run a transaction. We ended up having to use the swipe reader instead, which is less secure. 2. Not every device has a "this device only" option for reading sales reports.

The app is fine for the most part but I wish it would not fall asleep at our checkout counter. It appears to be ready because we just used it maybe half an hour or an hour earlier.. then we start charging a customer and it seemingly has to reconnect to the reader, which sits plugged in at all times, and we have to close and re-open Square sometimes because the reader beeps but nothing happens. And then we have to show the customer our transactions so they know we haven't charged them...

Horrible. They deactivated our account without warning, then literally made it impossible to contact customer service. Automated receivers would just end the call. No humans. No email responses. They're holding thousands of dollars while they terminate the account over the next 90 days. Furthermore, they somehow block phone numbers not even associated with the account, as we tried with personal numbers as well. Truly horrifying.

For the second time in 2 weeks square has placed my account under review. when they put your account under review you cannot access the funds that are in your account. running a business based on this is a terrible idea. I'm a mama mechanic so the money that was sent to me for parts is now frozen and I can't provide the goods to the customer. It's just a mess please don't use them they'll do good at first and they have for me in the beginning. as of late I cannot wait to find their replacement.

Square has the worst protection for the seller. They have all the information they need but allows the bank to make a decision on the transaction. Also the took their fee off top. When it was time for the refund... Square took the entire transaction from my account. So I had to pay back what square had already taken out aswell. SMH. NEVER AGAIN!!! SQUARE SUCKS!!

The plugin card reader's connector is too short to work with my Otterbox case. All they have to do is make the plug 1/16th to 1/8th of an inch longer and it would work; but, for the last 2 years, they have not done this. Because of this issue and my need for a fully portable solution with nothing glued to the outside of my case, Square is a no-go.

App was great until an update or something messed up my Transactions log. Now I can only see back a few days and when I click "load more transactions" it gives me a locked screen saying I need special permissions to access that. Apparently this is happening at random across the company I work with. Super frustrating to not be able to verify payments are accurate cuz I can't go back and see them!!

I am very disappointed with Sqaure and their service. I was excited to receive my card reader and to be able to start receiving payments quickly just as Square advertises. That was certainly not our experience!! My first transaction, which was important to us, was never given to us. They held the deposit for review. I answered all their questions, yet they would not deposit my funds. They instead deactivated my account with no explanation. Poor customer service and no money.

I am not sure what has changed in the last few weeks, but I am having to uninstall and reinstall this app and the invoice app to see newly added items to my online store. It used to sync within secs and now it is not syncing across the store and apps. I add items almost daily, so I am very annoyed. I have contacted support and have done what they suggested: uninstall/reinstall apps, force stop, clear cache, cookies on PC, update Chrome, try another browser, etc. and I am still having the issue.

Complete garbage...was ready to get a payment just to find out that square closed my account without a reason and without any notification. Called customer service and they cannot disclose why the account was closed. Customer service advised me to look for a different merchant to process my payments. Can you belive that !!! After almost 10 years... and tens of thousands of payments..sure I'll take my business somewhere else.

I thought it was just me. But not only do I have the same issues as everyone else lately, I find that it no longer communicates with my in-store application. My books are off because of it. Showing credits on client accounts where there should be refunds etc. I came here checking for updates, hoping that would fix things. Only to realize its the recent one that has messed things up. I may have to find an alternative. Soon.

Easy enough to use even on smaller phones. It does take a bit of getting used to. But once you have the hang of things it starts to feel second nature. Be mindful to give shorter meaningful names to your products as longer ones do get truncated. Icons only show 2 characters to represent a product. I found it easier to make general categories as the parent folder. Then assign specific product themes within each of them. Much easier to navigate a robust catalog as your business grows.

You've had lots of these reports ON YOUR FORUMS. See the 1 & 2 star reviews. It used to be great but in 2020 I (and other vendors at fairs) noticed the chip reader was going slower and disconnecting after every transaction. After having me try a few things, Support blames AT&T, AT&T says it's not on their end so I paid more for a hotspot. Now it's even slower and still disconnects every transaction. UGH! My profits are based on speed. This just isn't working. I need to find a solution.

If you have a Chromebook and use the contactless chip reader and it no longer works due to the latest update try this as it worked for me. Uninstall the app and re-download it. I had tried everything with no avail. Hard resetting the Square device, multiple times, doing all the things - nothing worked. Uninstallling and re-downloading worked for me.

Fees are less than other card processors I've looked at. Pretty unsatisfied with the unreliability of connection between the reader and my phone. Some days it will connect, other days not. Reader is always fully charged, and closing/restarting the app as recommended typically doesn't solve the problem. Frustrating when a customer is waiting patiently to pay. Then sending an invoice costs me more in fees.

Disconnects easy from phone making transactions harder and harder. Frustrated customers have walked away. To get it working again I have to constantly go to my app page and clear the cookies, and force stop the app, this happens 10 to 20 times a day.. Other than that it's convenient. I have checked to see if it needed an update and it did not. I went to reconnect within the app by pressing the button until it blinks..it was still only a temporary fix.

Convenient when it works. Seems to stop without notice. Can charge one minute & not the next. For the past week I haven't been able to charge at all. It's annoying & I'm losing business! I have spent HOURS with Square Customer Service but to no avail. I have unistalled & reinstalled. Changed password...& nothing. Thinking about going back to my old company!

Couldn't possibly have been worse. After hours of confirming this and uploading that giving them all the information that they could possibly need and then after about $2,500 in sales they decide that they're just going to up and cancel my account and it's non-negotiable. Now it's 92 days later and my money is still stuck on the app unable to be transferred to my bank account or even sent to me in a check. I lost a lot of money and quite a few customers due to this BS app.

My wife makes jewelry and sells it through a handful of craft shows throughout the year. Square has been perfect for us! We started out with Shopify which worked in a similar fashion, but after an initial grace period we started getting charged monthly fees to keep the account open. We switched to Square and couldn't be happier. You do pay a slightly higher transaction fee, but for us it's well worth it for the ease and convenience of knowing the app is always there and open to us!

Used to be great. Now can't get chip reader to connect. Keeps saying its connecting, even after it says "failed to connect" . Have 2 chip readers, same thing. Sometimes recognizes one, not the other. Tries to connect to the only one it recognizes, even when turned off, not the one that's on. UPDATE:. have done all of that on both readers on 2 different phones. Neither of the 2 contactless will connect to either phone. Updated app, Uninstalled/reinstalled app, You name it. And newer readers! 🤬

The swiping and product listing work well. The checking account and savings account access are horrific and not very user friendly. My goal was to have everything in a nice easy to use point of sale, to checking and savings (which do work). But, the dashboard is so poorly set up. I'm already looking to switch back to a normal bank. Maybe, it's a little bit me? But, I do have multiple online banking accounts and this is by far the least intuitive or user friendly of all of them.

Perfect for my small sells. Cost less than a monthly card reader. Does not charge unless you have a sale and it's only a small set fee per transaction. Honestly, it is way better to have a square than not have it. Safer as well, so no one is stealing your cash. Also, you can transfer to the attached savings account to grow interest. You can use the funds anytime without penalties, which is a major added bonus.

-Server errors. One example let's people think a purchase is done, walk away, only for the purchase to not have occured. -Recent change made it so refunds don't refund service fee. While it might match industry standards, this was an important differential for me. -Not really a standout in terms of fees. For such a big company one would think the economy of scale would help. -Super slow and under optimized app.

it's convenient to be able to download app and be taking credit cards within 30 minutes of installing it. Every transaction can be done from your phone. If your a Plumbing company like mine all your employees in the field can take payments on there phones as well. It's actually great. Square takes a percentage off the top but that's expected no one is in any business to do it for free we all have bills and have to eat. The apps free they only take a percentage when a payment is processed.

Had issues setting up my account. Wouldn't take a card payment with my magstripe reader, then when I called customer support, was told that my account was deactivated (even though I never got any such notice and my account seems fine on the dashboard). It's been impossible to reach a real person through any of their customer "support" channels. This experience and lack of support is enough to deter me from using Square or recommending it to any friends.

Do Not Use!!! My first transaction they held for days although promising "instant access". They then made me verify my identity (which I understand, but why not do that during setup instead of when waiting for my money), which took another two days. My very next transaction, they did the same thing all over again, although nothing had changed in the 20 days since the last transaction. Very inconvenient with horrible customer service.

Something has happened, maybe on the latest update. I have used this for 8 years and never had a problem all of a sudden the signature box will not open up after the transaction is approved. And if you don't get a signature you don't get paid. When the signature box is supposed to open I get a horizontal, then a vertical horizontal flip-flopping back and forth. Sometimes the screen just goes black. I fiddled with one transaction today and finally got it to come up. I can't do business like this

Square Register user - we use the app on a chromebook for off-site events, the app on a chromebook works fine but the interface is a bit clunky compared to the register. Would have liked mouse support. Also, we have never been able to get a printer to work with this app on a chromebook. Don't read between the lines here - Square Register is a fab POS and we would not change to anything else in our business.

I downloaded the square app and ordered a mag stripe reader, in preparation for my first craft fair. When I received the reader it did not fit my Samsung S20 Android phone. I contacted support and was told they do not have a reader to fit my phone. I responded that I didn't see in their literature that readers were incompatible with certain phones. My support person agreed, but told me I should have looked closer at the picture!!! I am EXTREMELY dissatisfied with this app!

Would be great if it wasn't for so many bugs. Switched my business to square and I've regret it since. You can't create new clients at all, it forces you to import them from contacts which doesn't work half the time, and trying to create a customer in the app just gives error codes. Often invoices won't load or send, and the custom items rarely show up as theyre supposed to. Due to bugs it often takes hours to write an invoice with a paragraph in it

The app is not so user friendly even after so many updates. Been with them almost 10 Years. Support seems to be 90% abroad ! Not an US company anymore. Once there is an issue with your account with zero explanation and not even a call will freeze all pending transactions for 3 Months. The currently hold $700 on hold. I don't recommend using them. Zero respect to long term customers! Lot of hidden fees. 2.5% on issue a check not mentioned anywhere during check writing!

The service fees are a bit steep for small business owners. App can be a bit glitchy in rejecting cards unnecessarily. It will take a while to enter card info manually when the scanner doesn't work (or hasn't arrived, if you're just starting out) to the point of upsetting your customers. Try to find other sources if you can if you're planning on buying this for your business.

Never had any problems with the app, POS hardware or software. Mostly very quick even over cell network. I'm not happy about the fee increase. I see they have 10 million + downloads so they must be making money. Even if only 1 million small to medium size businesses use them. I use their payroll service as well and it's convenient. However, if I found a POS system that was cheaper and as efficient, I'd switch. My loyalty is to the convenience and lower fee schedule.

Have used square for several years with zero issues. In fact, have recommended it to others. In the last month it has been awful. Constantly trying to reconnect, stops transmitting after every sale. I have cleared cache, restarted, redownloaded, etc with the same poor service. With so many people on here commenting the same issue I'm confused WHY it hasn't been addressed. Do better.

Paid to upgrad to the Bluetooth reader, it worked really well for about a week, it no longer connects to any of my devices. I've trouble shooted it every way square suggests to no avail, I really don't want to spend money on anotherone. The updates don't seem to help much. I really used to praise square, I like the back end, how it keeps track of transactions, but half the time I can't run a credit card, and that makes it hard for clients and myself alike. I'm not mad....just really disappointed

There is no way to see the transactions through the website. The app is a totally mess, it mix the names of the clients, it send order copies with other customers names!! How is it possible? It was supposed to do our work easier, not harder. I have to manually re-check and confirm with clients every payment!!! When I send a receipt copies, why the name of the client is not included??? I hope AI is not managing it now by itself, or may be can do it better than now.

I have had square for many years, and I must say that there were very few issues, and those that I did have were quickly resolved. That said I was told that once I reached a certain dollar level that I would recieve a lower rate. I more than reached that number and I requested my lower rate and was denied. So while they saved a few dollars by keeping me at the higher rate, they have already lost more than that as I have moved on to another processor as well as others in my network of over 17,000

The concept is great and I have used the card reader in the past. It apparently was not compatible with my phone so I went out and got a Samsung Galaxy 9 Plus. Guess what- card swiper will not work with this phone either.! Why can't the readers be compatible with up to date phones? I do not use the service much and hate to have to go pay $50 for a wireless reader.

I have used square for quite sometime and usually no problems. I recently purchased the contactless chip reader and when it works I love it. Every so often it will not work and on my app red light and says no app when I haven't changed anything. So what I have found is that I have to uninstall the app then reinstall and also unpair from bluetooth and repair and then it's up and running again but who has time for that when your busy and you need to check someone out quickly. Please fix this issue

Easy to take tap card payments and that's about the only good thing. My account is under review every 3rd transaction and they hold your money for 1-2 days until someone approved it. Ive had square for 6 months and my account has been under review over 30 times. And when I ask for an explanation of why my account is under review no one ever has an answer. Will be switching to a different processing company as soon as my money is back in my account!

I use the Bluetooth Square device that is actually squared shaped, when it works it's good but when I'm sitting there in front of a customer it takes forever to connect It's so annoying sometimes I have to run the card without it and pay a bigger fee. I even bought another one thinking this one was defective and they both work the same way. It's very cheap and lame. The screen where you sign and where the tips are is way too big of a font and you can't change it it takes up the whole screen

Horrible experience. Everything was great at the beginning then when I charged the client Everything was fine. But then once they received the money they set obstacles and loopholes in place. Saying that it would take 1 to two business days for an id verification. When I tried submitting documents it would not allow me. When I attempted to issue a refund they stated it would take 7 to 10 business days. But they took the money out of the clients account the same day.

Forced me to update without warning, leaving me unable to take payment. Since update, app has "connection issues", despite having full, strong signal as always and everything else working just fine. This leaves every single payment unprocessed, which could lead to me not getting payments if they end up not going through! This happens EVERY time the app is updated!

If I could give a negative rating I would. I had to use the app to take a deposit from a customer in that I was under the impression I was be able to transfer the funds instantly to purchase materials. But instead instant transfers arnt available until you take so many payments after creating an account so I was unable to complete orders to meet my deadlines. I will never use this app EVER again.

Too many changes happen at random with this app Tap to Pay has not worked for a few days with no estimate on it being fixed by engineer's.
