It costs more to manually enter a card number, how convenient. A lot of glitches recently with adding new customers as well. The app has cost me money the last few days, always worked fine before. Customer service wasn't much help.

I love using square for my pos system at markets, and it's very user friendly/easy to use!! I plan on using it as my main website soon (with the free subscription). I do wish there was an annual subscription cost option instead of just monthly payments. My main problem lately has been that the app keeps undoing my work (when I add an item or image it will save, but when I go back to the item later it's not there anymore). It's been frustrating and unusable since I can't edit or add any new items

Though most of the major functions are easy enough to figure out, there are many functions that are infuriatingly difficult to use. Example: want to set up a QR code to a product? Venmo, PayPal, and Cashapp make it incredibly easy to find. Square on the other hand, implements a 20 step process, and it's not available for ALL types of products. Due to multiple situations like this, I ended up deleting square and using other services.

The old layout was so much better. Now it takes extra taps to find the product you want to sell, and extra taps to charge. May not sound like a big deal, but those extra taps, all day long add up and become rather annoying, especially when you forget that extra tap it now takes to initiate the charge, and you're sitting there for several seconds wondering why it's not going...

In my line of work, my customers rely on speed. I can easily checkout 10 people in a minute WHEN the app works. The problem I am experiencing currently is that every 5 to 10 minutes, I have to pair the square to my device. I have tried different devices, different square readers, & nothing fixes the problem. The worst part is I CAN NOT find a number to get assistance. I know I lost sales the last few days & possibly future customers. Great when it works and costly when it doesn't.

Generally works, but often goes into offline mode despite being connected to strong wifi as well as having 4G LTE data on the devices. If I close the app and relaunch it, everything is fine again. This indicates to me that there is a bug in the app. Happens on all 3 devices used in our business, at multiple locations around the city...a Pixel XL, and 2 LG tablets. App updates have not resolved this. Very annoying.

Edit: they released my money 2 months later. Still don't recommend. 1 transaction and went through after it froze my account for "verification." I did another transaction and my account froze for verification again so I used my rent money while waiting for it to process through. Square shut down my account and is STILL holding my money hostage! They said 90 days to release my money and it would be in my account in 3-5 business days, its been 2 week. I cannot get through to customer service.

This app was great and I especially was loving the option to deposit checks so I can keep all my funds on one card. However, an issue has arose. A check was declined and the only information available is the amount and date it declined. I contacted support and they cannot see any customer information or a check number, they also cannot see why it declined like insufficient funds or because the picture was blurry. So now I have no way of knowing whose check declined. Please fix this

well I never got paid for the first four transactions I did. Account verified, customer's cards were charged and approved and one customer showed me a screenshot of where it was taken out of her account. Emailed twice with an automated response saying they would respond within 24 hours, that came and went twice, no way to call someone to help. Clicked on the number to call and got a message saying my account didn't have access to call without a code, no code to be found anywhere. I'm done.

the app itself is maybe 3 stars, it gets the job done, except when it says "please restore internet" when my connection with all other apps is just fine. The wireless square reader is 2 stars at best. It almost never connects to the app without pushing the little button, and waiting for 3-5 minutes while my customer is standing there! Many have given suggestions and nothing have made a difference, not a new chip reader or me using a different phone.

My account was closed as a small business and I can see why. But there is a balance that they have and shows in the deposit report as sending. Has been for weeks. Attempted to contact them but site keeps telling me to sign in to get a code. Then when I do,. told that service is not available to me, to email. I have several times and no response. They have made many dollars of fees yet I cannot speak with someone personally?! Going well? Fine. But talk to someone? Ha. No. Hiding something????

Definitely do not use this app. Spent several hours creating items and categories in the system, started selling, and after my bank clears for withdrawal, they say they are cancelling my account and are holding my money till October. Tried calling customer service and they say they don't know why it cancelled and can't find out. So they can screw we small business owners and get away with it.

This App has been great for our club. Even if you are paying with cash or check, the app includes it in the reports. Bad points for me: we have a couple of towns that share the zip code with other towns so you do not get the correct town when adding the customer to the database. Another bummer is that the square reader is not recognized by my tablet.

I have used square for several years What I do not like is that they will randomly decide to review your account and however long they decide to take to review your account determines how long you won't be able to use it, therefore losing money. They will do this without notice and just put your account on hold cannot make any transactions or get your money from the transactions made after they decided to review your account and not tell you. Very unprofessional and causes me to lose money.

The 6/10 update removed the ability to deposit checks into your Square account. The change was not noted in the update, the online legal terms for Square usage, or the support documentation that all confirm this feature is available subject to agreeing to the terms. Calling support, they stated to deposit checks, the account requires a "certain amount of banking history for that feature to be enabled," but they can't tell you how much or what kind. I've had good history so this is infuriating.

Please revert back to previous edition. 90% of my customers are military and can't wait while I navigate the menu to add their name and product purchased, to their receipt. They generally only have 45-60 minutes for lunch. Minimum 15 minutes from office to military mall. 20 minutes to order a meal and if lucky, able to sit and eat. Otherwise, if long line and slow service, barely another 15 minutes back to work. I want to keep last version prior to October 2021. We need the option.

Has been especially annoying lately. Taking more than 5 minutes to complete a transaction. And that's assuming it goes through at all. Doesnt show when it's connected anymore. Or when it's ready anymore. At the moment I have a sale that has cleared on the client side, bank account and all. But has completely disappeared on my end. Not. Cool!

I've been using this app religiously for over 8 years as a premium user to automate my personal finance needs. The best app out there! I was using a much older version as it was so stable. Just updated to v13 and now there's a number of items that need fixed and supported. Push notification used to be great but no longer fills in the amount and copies the note and many apps are missing. Need split transfers, mass note updates, combine existing transactions, etc. Changing from 5 to 4 stars.

This is a great app for its purposes and it was running great for 1-2 years. It randomly stopped detecting notifications from the Citi banking app, which comprises most of my transactions. I sent an email to the devs to see if it would be fixed and continued manually-inputting the transactions. Future updates and reinstalling the app over and over didn't change anything, and I slowly stopped using the app. Leaving at 4 stars since everything else worked well (with some minor bugs).

This was working great till recently. I picked this app specifically because it included future purchases on the balance sheet. Now it doesn't and I can't figure out how to fix it. Example, say I have $100 and I know a bill will come due in 3 days costing $75. When I enter the transaction for 3 days out, the account balance would show $25. Now, it still shows $100 and I have to open the individual account to see the true amount remaining. Low stars due to can't find a way to reach support.

Update March 2026 After using this app daily since 2022, I had to uninstall due to recent update that causes multiple bugs. The calculations, going in and out of the accounts just made the process for tracking and budgeting process long. It is unfortunate. The premium version was worth the price and I even purchased a coffee/pizza on occasion. I hope the developer returns to working on the app so that it works in the future.

WARNING: The app hasn't been updated since August 2024, per Google Play Store, so don't believe comments talking about more recent changes. I don't recommend using any app that hasn't been updated in such a long time and through multiple Android OS updates. I have had issues with Dropbox sync but sync with Google Drive still works fine. As for me, unfortunately I have to go find a replacement for Bluecoins since it appears to have been abandoned.

The app does exactly what I'm looking for, it's flexible enough without being too complicated. Easy 4-5 stars. I just started using it so I may still experience data loss others keep mentioning. But this app really deserves an extra star on top of any rating just for this: one time purchase for a reasonable price, no subscriptions. Thank you!

I have been using Excel since Mint closed. Bluecoins is an excellent app. I really like the scheduled transactions. One feature I would like to see would be a simple "Pay" button for credit cards that would auto fill the transfer fields for you. Overall it is one of the more affordable budget apps ( I paid for premium which is 25% off now+ Google gave me $3 in credit) so $3 and some change is not bad compared to some apps asking for like $60 a year.

The perfect solution for me.... So I have spent the last week trying out 4 other financial apps, and as I usually do, I start from right to left (z to a). The others were all quite good, every one was an editors choice, but all were lacking in one small thing or the other...for my situation. 15 seconds after setting up Bluecoins I bought it. It performed with the exact parameters I was looking for. Already, after 15 minutes and I have next years forecast in front of me to review. Perfect. Thanks

you need the premium version to add additional budget categories, but it's worth it. it was a one-time charge, not a subscription. took me a second to figure out the transactions and setup, but it's extremely customizable. Easily see break down by week, month, quarter. Adding a new transaction takes seconds, so quite easy to do right after a purchase. Easy edits. One week in, it's doing everything i needed.

Great app to keep control of your finances! Love the modern look, great customization options, and runs good. There's a backup option, great memory easy to record transactions and they have tags! Tags are a must for me because it gives you an extra thing to see stats by. So many apps like this don't have the tag option and therefore where do you put the stores name that you spent money at? This app does it all, pay to support!!

This does everything I need and some! We were looking for a way to budget without sitting down with receipts everyday. This is a much more convenient way to manage budgets with my spouse because it is online. There are SO many other features we haven't taken advantage of so I can't be super detailed about everything. But if you're looking for an online way to keep track of your spending, this is the way to go. After trying several free apps, we were left unsatisfied. This is worth the purchase.

The recent update erased all of my data back in December. I have sent 2 emails to support and have not heard anything back. At this point, I'm too salty to continue using this app and have moved on. I used the app for almost a full year and enjoyed it; the subcategories; being able to use multiple paying accounts and multiple categories on one transaction; the interface.

I absolutely LOVE this app. I was in desperate need when I found Prism, which was perfect (I thought). Then less than 2 months later Prism announced their closure 😪 Seeking I was, and went thru at least ten or more apps - a pain, I'm an all manual bean counter don't like syncs. Csv imports sure, boo auto syncs. All I can say is that Prism closing shop was the best thing, cause this app is so much better. It has all functions of Prism plus much more! Well worth the $7 macchiato I sacrificed.

Finally, after about 20 apps, I found one that does what I need it to do! I was using another checkbook/budgeting app and after the last update it was super buggy. With this app, I can import my transactions from my bank per QIF files or add individual transactions, clear them as needed, select multiple transactions at a time and add their categories, gives me up to date information on my budgets and spending, etc. Glad I found this one!

I've spent many months looking for some sort of financial manager app and I finally settled upon Bluecoins. After having it for 2 months I've found it to be the easiest, most reliable financial app I've ever tried with every feature that could be wanted. This is the first and only app of any kind that I've ever bought a paid version for, and I 100% don't regret it one bit. Hope it continues its excellence and am hoping to continue using it for a very long time.

I absolutely love this app for balancing my books. the only thing I don't understand very well is how to track how my crypto investments are growing. also, how to log changes in my stock prices and the fees accrued to maintain them. otherwise, this is a really great product that I have never found anything else that can compare. is there a way, though, that I can transfer my data to a book keeping program on my computer? I use Linux. thank you so much!!

I love that the premium version for this is just a one time payment, and it's even cheaper than most subscriptions for one month on other money tracking apps. It's already very in depth without premium. From what I saw before getting it, I already was getting 90% of the whole package for free and I wasn't harassed by any pop ups or ads anywhere on the screen. I've been very picky about what app I use when it comes to the look of the UI. I'm glad I landed on this one.

Best budgeting app out there. Ive tried so many of them and this one is the easiest to work with. You dont have to surrender any private account credentials. My favorite function is that it can easily start records automatically for you from your bank notifications transaction notifications. No need to store your records in the cloud either because there is an automatic backup feature to store locally. You can even set up a PIN number to protect your information. I feel its very secure.

Good app to monitor your expenses, savings and manage your budget. My main issue with it is that I can't create an expense and show that it will be deducted from a specific account and added to an expense account or liability. So that doesn't really help with the budget summary sheet. For instance, I want to pay my credit card bill from a specific acc. I can add the expense, tell the app what account it comes from but I can't have it added to my credit card liability. Would need another trans...

This app lets you track all of your accounts (checking, credit cards, assets, etc.) separately. Transaction entry is quick and simple. The layout is easy to navigate, with a lot of useful views. Two critiques: 1) The reconciliation of statements is lacking. It needs something to quickly balance each account against the bank's monthly statement. Currently, I am individually editing each entry. 2) It could use an option of a check number for checking accounts. Otherwise a great app. Address these, and I'd rate this a 5!!!

As an accountant, I like this app very much. I ditched Quicken, after using that program for decades. My only complaint, so far, is the recording of a payment on a loan. The app doesn't allow for the decreasing of the loan and the recording of interest in the same transaction. I can create 2 transactions but I shouldn't have to. I'd give the app 5 stars if it wasn't for that issue.

This is literally the best budgeting and finance app I've ever used. I've tried them all, everything from YNAB to expense managers, to wallets. All of them were "goodish" but each lacked something that drove me crazy. (Like the inability to mark something as cleared, or not seeing future transactions, or not being able to have more than one account.) This app has every single feature I need. I've searched for YEARS for the best budget app. Bravo!!

EDIT: Developers are no contact after Email, bad option. I have the paid version of this app and I am VERY DISAPPOINTED AND ANGRY!!!!!!! I can't get this app to backup to Google drive let alone sync with my other devices. I have WASTED a lot of time setting up the app just to find out that it doesn't backup or sync at all!! Then spent time trying to get the backup and syce features to work. This app may work for others, but for me it is an EPIC FAIL!!! The hunt for a monry manger app continues.

HORRIBLE!!! The amount of panic I had yesterday when my app updated to the new UI. All of my data was lost but I was able to recover it because I have an app that syncs folders to my Google drive. Today, changes are being made slowly that are making it better to fix the disaster that was created. They still need to fix the huge note box. It serves no purpose and I have to scroll down just to make a note with two or three words. Absolutely ridiculous!

Best choice in the playstore for those that prefer to manage their own data entry (vs letting a 3rd party snoop around your bank accounts). The pro version of this app is worth every penny. Happy user for a while now. Intuitive UI, easy integration for online backups, and as customizable or simple as you need. The ability to extract transactions from push notifications from other apps (you decide which to allow) is killer.

Best Financial App Yet! And I'm an accountant! This app has all the things that the other apps don't. I can split a transaction into multiple budget categories. I'm amazed that most apps don't have this option. I go to the grocery store and buy food, toilet paper, cold medicine, and I guess the other apps expect me to take it all out of the food budget. The budget feature is amazing and works seamlessly with the financial transactions. Why are you still reading this...download this app now!

With nearly all finance apps requiring me to link some sort of account in order to be useful, I love that this app lets me track my spending on my own terms. I've gotten into much better budgeting habits thanks to this app, and nothing else I've tried has even come close to this amount of flexibility. If I can make only one suggestion, I'd love for there to be a widget (Android) that allows me to track multiple account balances at once, but otherwise my experience with this app is great!

Bluecoins is one of only 3 apps I've ever paid any money for, and it's marvelous. The developer is incredibly responsive and the app works great, simple as that. Update: Unfortunately, I've had to stop using the app, the sync feature does not work well enough to share with the rest of my family, and that's a showstopper for me. Still worked great for single users, but for managing household finances it can't compete with apps which sync transactions individually.

Like a lot of people below, I found this after having used dozens of budget/expense apps. This really does combine them all for me which is amazing for what I needed. I bought the premium version after 10 minutes and I rarely buy apps, ever. The one thing that would be great to see is moving the 4 Calendar views around because the default daily Categories isn't the best view in my opinion with the whole point being Future Projections for me. Otherwise, great job overall so far.

It took awhile for me to figure out how to best use this application. Previously, I was using two apps. One app was for envelope budgetting and the other was a bank ledger. I needed a bank ledger to forecast how much money I have left after paying off bills. I was doing double entries and I decided at the end of 2022 to find an app that does both. I bought the app and so far, so good. This app met my requirements.

NO RESPONSE AT EMAIL ! ! ! Start from last update my premium version it's not working anymore. Everytime I click the upgrade just say that I have ready own the item. But everytime I open the app still a lots of ads. Since my last email already past two weeks no response. The only response from half months ago it's a weblink didn't halp anything. If you read this please don't upgrade to premium. It will let you get ads, joke, helpless but nothing.

I used to love it but I just spent an hour updating account info and now it's all gone. Zip, nada. 3 hrs work wasted. What if I try again? Will the same thing happen? Updating this, or rather downgrading from 2 stars to 1. Can't add more categories as it says I have to upgrade which I already did. All the info is again lost. Followed the tech support suggestions re the glitch (of which I'm not the only person with the problem) and it still says I have to upgrade. Give it a miss.

Let me be clear: The app works great. It has excellent functions and for a SINGLE individual, I would highly recommend it. What i didn't understand is that if you are using the app on two devices, then each time you are saving your changes, you override everything the other device had on it. There is no way to use this app with two people without constantly erasing each other's entries whenever you update your changes in the cloud. I only found this out after weeks of my wife and I using the app

Such an extremely helpful app for me. Its easy to use abd it pretty self explanatory for most of the features. 4 stars because there really should at least be the option to add a bank account if I wanted. It's literally the only think keeping this from being the perfect app. I would be willing to donate for it. I can customize so many things. Either way, highly recommended companion app.

You guys are great! Love the continuing updates and improvements. New user and the more I use it, the more I like it. Still exploring, has nearly everything I wished for in phone accounting. I'll update after I've exhauted the all the options and features. Great work guys, wonderful program. Only took me a day to choose the premium version.

This app is great! So easy to use. Lots of ways to categorize and report expenses. Many ways to slice and dice data, trending, etc. Exactly what I was looking for. I got the paid version, worth every $. UPDATE: All I can say is WOW! The more I use this app and get familiar with the features and different ways I can look at my finances, the more I love it. Thanks for putting thought in even the simple things.

Great App, not sure why I haven't review it here. All our finances here, we found some workarounds to stuff like data sync with multiple users by having a Dropbox account just for this. We use this app as a couple to track our shared finances, it requires lots of commitment, but is worth it. My only suggestion is to work a bit more on the widgets for home screen, a budget widget showing how much is left to spend for the different categories would be great. Thanks and keep up the good work.

Very good app with great reports and many features. Only thing I feel missing is account registration with email and automatic cloud backup. Sometimes changing phone or reinstalling app makes users worry about losing data. Manual backup and third-party sync is little confusing for normal users. If there is simple sign up with email and data automatically saved in cloud, it will give more confidence and peace of mind. This feature will make this already amazing app even better.

I agree with other reviewers - core app is great but updating to v13 introduces a plethora of bugs - pdf exports inserts random data, some calculations require the app to be refreshed before it gets it right. I'm sticking with the app because the good totally overrides the bugs - but I hope the developer steps up fixes & development as it was when I first stated using 8+ years ago.

Missing running balance on split transactions after update I love this app and have been using it for a long time, but a recent update changed how split transactions are displayed. In single-account transactions, the running balance shows up perfectly. However, when a transaction involves a split or multiple accounts (showing "2 Accounts"), the running balance now completely disappears, leaving that space blank. Please fix this UI regression!

It's done what others haven't. I've been using Quicken forever, and it no longer runs with moden Windows. It uses a format that's no longer supported. The export file of QIF is supported by a few finance apps, but none really recognise Quicken let alone multiple accounts. Long-winded I know, but the short of it is that Bluecoins not only recognises the file but it's installed (one at a time) 10 different accounts with every entry going back over 30 years, on Android. Now, that's impressive.

I have been using this app for many years, but recent update made it basically useless. With over 30k transactions now it takes 15-20 seconds to add new one. Lists with transactions do not load at all. Entering of transactions ends up with random and async text changes that lag behind etc. I would rather go back to old app and use that than new one. If you have a lot of entries, look for somehing else now.

ever since updating to version v13 the SMS or even the bank notifications no longer work properly. I have been using this app for a while and generally love it, but since this last update that broke these things, I find it becoming more of a hassle than it's worth. I did reach out to support but it takes forever to get a response. Currently, I have been waiting 4 days for a response to the SMS issue. I would give it 5 stars if this issue can get fixed.

The App which was the best of its kind has now become very buggy and nearly unusable. SMS capture buggy, reminder notification not working, photo capture bugs, bugs in scheduling transaction, auto sync not working, bugs in cash flow, bugs in similar transaction view. The list is long. Many mails detailing the issues remain unresponsive and issues unresolved. It was an excellent financial tool. Hope the developer is able to resolve the issues before all is lost

Idk what's been going on with this app lately. I'm a premium user and the past few days, my account has switched to the standard version 3 times, then I started seeing annoying ads, data not synced online etc. After some digging, apparently my other Gmail in my phone was using the standard version because I'd installed this app on another phone. Like wth do you care about my other Gmail account? I didn't bother emailing the developer because they've never ever replied to a single email.

Dear Bluecoins Support Team, First and foremost, I would like to express my appreciation for your excellent application. It has become a fundamental tool for managing my income and expenses, keeping my personal finances seamlessly organized. I am reaching out regarding a technical issue that arose immediately following the recent update released on May 8, 2026. Prior to this update, the automated integration between my incoming bank SMS notifications and the app functioned perfectly.
Ever since the UI update, I forgot when but it's been so long since, the app began to feel slow. Like there's a 3 second loading when searching for previous inputs when it was instantly before.

Good financial app to manage expenses with budget tracker and features. Had to remove 1 star as not able to add category manually depsite of premium version. Such messed up I saw with this app first time in many years since launched.
Best Budget App I ever had without the need for yearly subscription. easy to use and understand.

I've been using this app for years. Compared to the old version, the new one has several bugs I've never seen before, including: Copying items sometimes misses part of the content. Modifying the amount of a split item doesn't update the total amount. Copying items also copies over the reconcile data

Online Sync has a bug. Can you fix this? Every time I change something in transactions, categories, or labels, it doesn’t upload immediately to replace the previous backup in Bluecoins. That’s why when I open the app, it goes back to the old data. This is really annoying, by the way.

This is the best app on playstore for managing money. One of the best app buy I can recommend. Suggestion: I would really prefer to see the previous interface back or atleast the option to switch back to the previous interface for those who prefer that. It was a lot cleaner and more legible. Also would recommend one tweek in the adding of transaction. While adding a transaction, there should be an option to exclude the transaction for your expense or income reports.

Thanks for the app. It would be really nice to have "PC manager" type of feature like in Money manager app. Edit: I also would like to ask to make enable to budget expenses according to the percentage of income of the month. As my income differs from month to month it would be great to have that option. Thank you, Bluecoins team for delivering such a precious app. edit 2: would be great to have an option to back up to WebDAV.

Edited my five star to a three star for now. Been using Bluecoins for the past three years. I credit it for helping me build disciplined finances thanks to how intuitive it is. However, beware that the latest UI change has made the account balances inaccurate. Developer is also unresponsive--sent multiple emails with no response--and updates take a while. Without the bugs, it's a great app I would highly recommend. For now, use at your own risk.

I am so glad that Mabuhay Software has released a new version of the app, with many enhancements and tweaks. In my experience and opinion, Bluecoins is the best expense management app! The really nice thing is that the developer still offers the premium version of the app as a one-time payment. I have the premium version but have also donated to support the developer; they deserve it the most.
after the major UI and UX changes, the navigation between pages from the side menu is broken, and in recent updates the app cannot get the transaction information from Google wallet notifications

one of the few apps I've bought, and a daily driver. But I would like the option of getting the old UI back. The new one makes it less usable and less quick to use in some cases. there are also some bugs like that the account overview on the main tab doesn't update unless I scroll up and then back down to it.
Has every feature I could possibly need. Amzing UI. Also a big selling point is the one time purchase premium

been using blue coins for years. This has happened 2 months in a row now, changing the notes in an account has completely changed my balance which is throwing off the whole Ledger because I have to make an adjustment which shows up in the budget and graphs. there's nothing I can to Omit them. when it does change the balance in the account there's no transaction for it and it just seems to be a random number. I changed the notes in my credit card account and it added $6,968.34

The app itself is great. (when it works). I have used it for many years with 2 x premium plans. However, it does not sync with Google Drive properly now and crashes when trying with Dropbox, you are on your own and just stonewalled when you contact support, which is a huge letdown for what was a great App.
tf is the problem with this app? why is my data gone even if it is connected to gdrive? waste of time, backup is useless

Feb 6, 2026 Update: I am a very long-time user of this app even before 2020. I just can't remember when I started using this app. The latest version of the app is so much filled with UI glitches and inaccurate balances that it is so frustrating and borderline unusable right now. I tried to share my feedback and request for support thru their support email back in Nov 1, 2025, but I got no response. I wouldn't recommend this app to anyone right now. So disappointed. 😔

The app is pretty good overall, I have been using it for more than a year and was pretty satisfied but the latest changes in UX/UI are not good, the palette, size of elements and the overall layout is not an improvement from the previous one.

QuickSync does not work. I had to replace my phone because it broke and I thought since I purchased the app and turned on QuickSync, my backups would've fine. It wasn't. After installing on my new phone and restoring backup from GDrive, it was outdated. Lost months worth of transactions. I don't recommend this app at all. What a waste of money.

I was loving this app using for managing my personal finance until I faced lots of issues after paying for pro version, I was using andromoney app prior to this app, I imported all the transaction from andromoney to this app, every thing was working fine for 2 week or so, suddenly its changed all the transfer transaction, the original transaction was like cash transfer to bank, but in fews weeks it automatically showing opposite to the original transaction, my all transaction got changed,

v13 after initial doubts, now find this even more user-friendly. Pity about the kinks in the csv data import and eccentric categorisation used in qif import. v12. Excellent finance app. Very flexible, good reporting and data transfer abilities. Handles different currencies well. Easy to set-up and use.

Initially I was looking for a finance programme to replace Quicken and Bluecoins seemed likely to fit the bill. Now that I have been using it for a couple of months I am well pleased. It is easy to enter and manipulate my data. This can be examined in a variety of ways ranging from simple lists to very useful charts. This gives me very good views of my current and future financial position

Great app, very well designed (premium) . Handles foreign currency transactions, allowing rates to change over time, user-control over the rates used. Good csv export, filters, backups. Intuitive interface & good user guide. Extensive customisation. v13 slow/jittery, with selection lists liable to close before selection complete (too sensitive to gestures). Import csv function useable but full of bugs. Applying fx rates to transactions now erratic. Overall still very good, but losing 1 star.
Very difficult to sync data
I just like the UI and I went pro for the cloud sync

Thank you for the app! Nice choices of customizations, can add types of transactions, and then sub types of transactions. Can add long notes about each transaction. Can also have labels for more differentiation. So far feels nice to use. But, not many choices of icons to choose, and the internet data usage that the app keeps using for what I can't guess what it is because I don't sync to anywhere.

I prefer manual entry for keeping track of my finances, after searching through several apps. Bluecoins is definitely the best. So good that I ended up getting the premium version, which is a one off fee as opposed to monthly occurance. The app does everything I need, I can organise into categories, labels, accounts. See detailed reports, breakdowns and it can be backed up and exported!

I love this app so much but the recent update made it more difficult to use for me. I love the added search function for selecting Accounts/Category and how sleek it looks now. But, I don't like the new interface for splitting the bills. Also, I can no longer sync easily across devices. I have the premium version but my other device kept on asking me to upgrade. I had to log out my other google accounts to get the premium and sync my devices. When I add back my other accounts, it won't work.

Best budgeting app I've tried. Although, it would be useful if there was a feature that would generate an automatic billing on your credit card and remind you thereof since I already provided my cut off and due date. It's quite a hassle to compute how much is included for a particular billing period. I can always check my actual billing statement from the bank but it would be very convenient if it was already built-in in the app.

Pros: subcategories, most personalization out there, multiple accounts, multiple free stats, recurrent expenses, transfer between accounts. [Edit] I've upgraded to the paid version, but I think there is a fundamental con: you have to have two separate categories for everything, one for expenses and one for earnings. So, if you spent €50 in a Shopping/expense category, and you return €30 in a Shopping/earning category, the analysis will show you've spent €50 because they are different categories.

best finance app I have used! (And I tested many before settling on this one.) Used the free version for a while and then opted to pay the (small) one time fee for using multiple currencies, more accounts, etc. It was worth it. Provides a great demo and so much customization. Love the ability to split transactions into multiple categories and it has great visuals to show where I am at with spending and income in whatever time frame I want.

Great app after trying and ditching many many apps, I have to settle for this one. So fast and straightforward to input transactions, it is fun! (I look forward to inputting transactions! ) So flexible and versatile to meet your needs quickly! Only that the sync between devices can be a small hassle but one can live with that. The lifetime subscription is also a small amount and considerate, compared to some less useful apps I know, who charge an arm and a leg, annually!!!

I can say this is the best expence tracker I've found so far. Nice reports, and support for multi-currency. One big drawback for me is that the digit setting is applied to all currencies, it's not possible to set for each individual currency. If you use crypto currency, you would want to have like 6 digits. Unfortunately currently Max. 5 digits is possible, and if you set 5 digits other currency such as EUR, USD are also displayed with 5 digits which I found annoying.

Had been using moneywiz, but they are withdrawing their support for android and I was really struggling to find something similar, trying loads of apps with no sucess. I then saw a recommendation for this app and it is truly brilliant. All I need, no need to link to bank accounts and even more, no annual fee! Bluecoins, I'm with you for the long haul!

I was trying to find a financial trail tracking app and this suited my taste the best so far. I was pretty suprised on how cheaper the one-time premium payment of this compared to other similar apps. But since I'm broke, I wanted to find the best free features and this is it. I did find minor bugs(like the whole list of labels disappearing when I delete one) but I'll definitely be sticking with this for awhile.

Excellent in every way I was (painstakingly) looking for. Originally thought I wanted desktop access as well, but tried this app regardless. I don't regret it. Manages my multiple international accounts and income/expense streams so damn easily. It's almost addictive now to keep track of my finances. Was also very happy & willing to upgrade to Premium within days of it becoming essential to my daily budget. I spent the time to play around in the demo first, then tried myself, and now I'm all in.

The one! The only one which can easily allow me to track all my money sources. It requires discipline to keep on top of your finance life, but it is worthwhile look at the dashboard and know what's is going on. The only thing to make this app like no other is to bring this interface to web, that would be awesome! Subscription would be worth paying in that case.

Love the app. Probably the best home finance app out there with its great sync, broad features, good reporting and clean interface that looks great on a small Pixel. The only thing I would like to see is an option to add a running count for transactions so that filed paper documents can be quickly located without having to rely on dates or receipt #s and so missing entries can be quickly spotted. Anyway, thanks for a superlative piece of software.

Probably best Expense tracker app I've seen so far. I have tried several, even paid for them, but will settle on this one. Only down side is the font is very hard to read on smaller screens. It does say optimised for large devices but most the time I use it on my phone. Please if you could make fonts larger or adjustable, that would be great.

Simply an incredible app. The free version is perfect for personal accounting and I've been using it for over a year now. I've switched to premium so as to organize the family economy and it's still the best option I've found yet. One thing I would ask the developers to add (though it is quite niche to my situation) is the possibility to define budgets in more than one currency.

Have been using for a week and really like the app. The import feature is quite good and I can import transactions from my bank. Would be good to be able to customise the fields that the exports align with but for a free app it is excellent. Going to upgrade to the premium, my initial testing is showing that it will help track my budget. I will be able to recover the cost of the app through the improvements in cash flow in my offset account. Like the idea of online sync. GG Bluecoins :-)

The app seems nice. However it's been impossible to use it in 2 devices (using the same account), since the 2nd device can't sync even after upgrading to premium. Prior to "sync", the 2nd device asks for a "Premium upgrade". So does it mean that I need to buy a "premium" upgrade in every device I get to use? I've written twice to the support mail, with no response after 4 days.

I've been using this app for about 5 years to manage my money. It's great. I find the easy to read data is very helpful motivation wise. Its greatly customisable so depending on your finances can take a moment to set up. The app has the ability to read messages from a specific contact and my bank can send messages so importing data is so easy. It's all stored on the device but you do have the option of uploading the cvs to Google cloud.

This app has a learning curve that's a bit steeper than basic budget apps, especially if (like me) you are not well versed in accounting. However, after giving up on my incredibly complicated spreadsheet, and trying most budget apps on the play store, this is the only one that gives me the same functionalities I had in my spreadsheet (and I also learned a tiny bit of proper accounting in the bargain!) Premium is maybe not really necessary but very cheap, and I don't mind supporting the devs ;)

Just started with it and still learning. But so far so good. It would be better though if the category entries would also have some notes area to type in or a better yet a tab soley for note taking or creating shopping lists or something we could put some explanations or thoughts for ourselves. Better also if you have videos on how to use it. It took me a couple of days to fully understand it. I am no accountant nor a mathematician, just a normal budgeter transitioning to this app :)

Selected few apps, after reviewing them (this app also comes with a demo of the features it offers which was really helpful), I've decided this is the app for me and bought the paid version, it is definitely value for money, app lets you split expense and income catogories, add and delete them, add various transactions, upload pictures, export data, various graphs available for easier review of data, also budgeting per category and subcategory available. All in all very thrilled about the app!

Easily the best finance track app I've ever used. It has all the features you'd want and with filters and the search tool it makes it easy to see how much you're spending at different places each month. The only thing I wish it could do is when I say I pay a certain amount "every two months" it knew it meant I pay it once every two months rather than showing me half for each month in my budget. One month it says 0% and the next month it says 200% of the budget. But that's a small nitpick.

I tried other finance apps, but they just didn't quite do what i needed. This app is the BEST I've tried, and the paid version is even better! It didn't sync back when i bought it, so i hoped i never lost my phone, but now it does and i couldn't be happier! Also, when i got a new phone, (and didn't realize i was backing up and restoring from different accounts - oops), the developer was very quick to email me back, providing options for restoring everything on the new phone. Thanks, Bluecoins!

Best expense tracker I've ever used. I also use it for budgeting, that could be better, but for the premium price I paid I feel pretty satisfied. I love the customization options and account/category splitting in one transaction. It also supports different currencies at the same time. The app helps me to keep track of covers all my financial products in one place and covers all my current budgeting needs, so for me it's just shy from perfect.

I got the premium version to sync cross device/platform (sync via Google drive). For starters, the €18 for iOS felt like a ripoff. The sole reason for buying premium was being able to sync between android and iOS. However, on iOS nothing works with sync on. After my initial review the dev team told me to reach out via mail. And yet, nothing. No answer whatsoever. Better go looking elsewhere if you need sync with Android and iOS...

Very nice! Beautiful and easy to use. Only thing missing is templates! And I wish the date in transactions display was a little bit bigger and more readable. And the category background when you add an expense in black mode would be better also in black and not grey. Also you can't see the monthly summary of an group that includes multiple categories. You only can see the monthly summary for each category not the group.

I like this app very much, has all kinds of graphs and ways to show stats. Also very deep and educative documentation to let you understand all the terms. It is very straightforward and simple to use. I feel it falls a little short on the graphics side compared to others, but that also keeps it simple. I really recommend it!

It's a great app. I'd like to request a feature: when deleting categories, is it possible to add an option to merge all transactions under that category with another category instead, rather than grouping them under "others"? Edit: 4 stars is what I feel this app deserves. I changed it from 3 stars, after a reply from the dev. 4 stars- "i liked it". And I did. Though there is much room for improvement. I will rate 5 stars when I feel the app deserves 5 stars.

I've downloaded and tested over 10 apps to see what's the best Finance / Expense Tracker out there. I ended up using BlueCoins. Best Expense Tracker ever 💯!!! Kudos to the developers, you've done such great job! (I don't normally leave app ratings, but I make exceptions to those who really deserve it.) Keep up the good job! I highly recommend this. I already recommended it to my friends.

I've been using this app for like 2 years. I find it really useful and complete. However, just after buying the premium versión, the widget, which is one of the things I use most, has stopped updating when I add an income or an expense. I'm looking into other apps in case this doesn't get fixed.

playStoreReviews.text: I’ve been using this app for 6–7 years, and it’s been very helpful for my business. Initially, I used it for wholesale billing, but now I also use it for retail due to its fast and easy billing process. I would appreciate a mobile update to send e-bills via personal WhatsApp. I use an Android tablet at my counter, and this feature is currently available only on Windows. I dont have space to setup PC as my counter is prone to water as it is an aquarium and Pet Store

earlier I posted a review regarding the problem I faced, after that support team contacted me and assured that i will not face any issue again. issue was about getting multiple calls for reselling their premium plans. But there is nothing changed after two weeks also i am getting multiple calls from their side. It seems they doesn't take any complaint or customer queries seriously. Just they want we should keep our business aside and just do one thing , resell resell and resell vypaar premium.

Very good accounting package. It covers all the basic required features for SME and for varied types of small business. The best part is their online service which is quick, efficient and undoubtedly great. Whenever you have any query, you can call their online service team and you will get your query resolved effectively. In-case of genuine issues/limitations, their team will call and get it resolved too. My personal recommendation is "A great software with great value for money".

Easy to use ,, Almost same features like any high cost software . review 2nd = Lots of improvement needed even billing is not good .. you can not select what sales man can do what not ... while doing billing you can create a new item which is worst ,, can enter mrp at your own will this is pathetic... these are very basic things which are missing from long now .

Currently, when I enter a purchase bill, the purchase rate updates automatically. However, I would like the corresponding sales rate to also update automatically based on the purchase rate. I’d like the option to set this sales rate adjustment either as a percentage or as a fixed amount above the purchase rate.

thanks to the app management and everything is ok and good to go one feedback is that we cannt do 2 things at same time like purchase and sales. and the message goes instantly to the vendor either half bill entered which creates conflict.

Hello Vyapar Support, I want to update the Low Stock Alert for multiple items at once. I have many products, so editing them one by one takes a lot of time. Please let me know if there is any option for Bulk Edit or Import/Export to update the Low Stock values for all items together. Thank you.

Vyapar is easy to use for basic billing and accounting, but several important business features are missing. The app lacks some advanced inventory management, reporting, customization, and business automation features that many growing businesses need. Customer support and feature updates could also be improved. It is suitable for small businesses with simple requirements, but may not meet the needs of businesses looking for more comprehensive management tools.

I am very disappointed with this experience. The information about device usage was not explained clearly. I was not informed that this application can only be used on one desktop and one mobile device at a time. playStoreReviews.text: Very simple, would be great to save items to use over and over again. It's very misleading. I wasn't able to bill one invoice unless I paid a $9.99 mo they fee. Wasted time using advanced features and itemizing line by line to only find out I couldn't send my one free invoice as advertised. And it's sad because I love the layout and ease of use, but if you mislead me right out of the gate, why wouldn't you do it again in the future??? 2 stars for a good layout and easy to use, minus 3 for misleading

This is a good application lots of different invoice layouts, you can link it to your paypal, it has the option to mark paid and it will also send you reminders that you have unpaid invoices. but after you have sent out $1,000 in invoices they want you to pay a 6.99 upgrade fee. The representative I spoke to said that if I let my membership through Google expire, I could rejoin for $5/mo I would not be charged that fee. That was a lie.

New update is awful! No longer user friendly. Typing/spacing issues. Especially when typing numbers, they constantly double. Currently looking for new apps/software now.

I say this because I found the emails sent directly from the app, were sent to my customers "spam" folders. Outside of that, satisfied thus far.

If somebody disputes something even after paying on their app with a credit card they auto draft the money right out of your linked bank account. The client even contacted them to say it was an accident. You pay monthly, then 3% per transaction. They also charge your account for declined credit card transactions. Horrible app. No phone number to contact them. Probably the worst out there. Ive now switched to square. Its cheaper and actually have customer service. Invoice simple is a rip off!!

This app is awesome! Very easy to use and quick for making up invoices. Unfortunately since the latest update, the app won't even open up anymore, it's just stuck on the logo when it first opens, It won't go past it for some reason. Even Uninstalled and reinstalled, no luck. Very very unfortunate as I have all my billing info amd everything on it. Not sure what the deal is. A quick fix would be greatly appreciated!

PLEASE DON'T WASTE YOUR TIME OR MONEY ON THIS APP. Used the app for almost 1 year and at first it was good, but then issues started to happen. Invoices start to duplicate, you can't close invoices, if you delete an invoice you have issues with the next invoices created. You can't even speak with customer service because they either don't have the correct solution or show they don't care. Now to top it off they will start charging way more in October for the same features. Not worth it

I am furious! I created and deleted (without sending) 2 estimates while trying to learn the components of this app and now I have to pay a minimum $5 per month for ONE INVOICE! I took the time to add multiple Items to my list and I have yet to send one estimate using this app! I have no idea if it even works as far as emailing my client! Your trial period should be based on items SENT! Upfront cost is vague, and monthly rates are overpriced for the number of invoices/estimates that can be sent.

Hate it!! It is advertised as a free invoice making app. NOT TRUE! Everything was great until the third invoice when the app star to try to charge me for a subscription. I don't appreciate that a little bit. If it is a "free" app that doesn't let you send the invoices for free to your clients it is NOT free at all! Deleting now. BYE!!!!

Good app, but it's annoying when you click the 'mark paid' button and it brings you to a screen that promotes for adding PayPal and payment systems to your app. I don't want to be bombarded everytime I am making a client a receipt. It should be an add on option in the settings, not a pop up every time I click 'mark paid'. Don't want any form of ads especially when I am paying money to use this app.

Set up an account. Filled out an invoice sheet. Hit complete and it asked for a subscription. You get no love for trying to pull an oke doke after I went through all the trouble. I'll find a free one that's just as effective! 0 *s Thanks for the quick response. I don't have a problem paying if I knew that's what I was required to do from the onset. The fact that I went through the whole process and then you spring it when I try to send it. It's underhanded and sneaky. Pay your people well!

I've been using this Invoice Maker for over 3 years now. Went paperless for my lawn service business. No more reams of paper, boxes of envelopes or postage costs. Paid for itself in less than a month. This app is very simple to use. You can upload your logo, create an invoice in minutes, then send it by text or e-mail, receive confirmation it's been sent, received & read and receive payments. Adding pictures to invoices is nice. Very professional. Great for small business at an affordable price. The recent updates have been making the app better and better. Simple & amazing!

I've used this app for nearly 10 years. It was rough in the beginning but has ever so slowly improved into a decent program. Unfortunately, it seems greed is taking over. They keep taking away features that have been included for years, forcing you to buy the next tier sub to get them back. It's now 20 bucks a month to send more than 10 invoices a month. I suppose if you do 200 invoices a month, it doesn't seem bad. For the little guy that does 11-15, probably best to look elsewhere sadly.

Seemed like it might work, but hardwalled a subscription demand before I could use it enough to decide if it's going to work for us. Not willing to spend money on a subscription just to find out if it's what we need. Also nagged me to rate the app after creating an account. The amount you get to use the app before the hard wall is not enough to rate the app.

EDIT: The developer has responded to this comment about using the share option. This option DOES NOT CURRENTLY EXIST. I contacted support and they confirmed this. Developer not being honest. Apparently they updated the app and now you can only send as an email directly through their server unless you go to the print menu, save it as pdf (can't change the file name), close the app, open your email, find where it was saved, and attach it. They have no timeline to fix this issue.

Mobile VS Desktop For some reason the mobile version does not appear to update what has been entered on the desktop version. Very inconvenient and we pay more to have both versions. One thing of the top of my head is that a deposit invoice was sent out on the desktop version and when I went to send the invoice out for the balance from my mobile because I didn't have my laptop with me. It showed the invoice with the full amount due. My app was up to date on play store.

Had been using this app for over a year. It was simple , easy, and convenient to use and reasonably priced for features . Moving forward, they want you to pay YEARLY almost doubled in price and LIMITED the invoices you can send, unless you pay TRIPLE what you were paying for unlimited. Tisk tisk, not renewing and moving to another invoice maker.

BEWARE: The sign up page has a small box where you consent to text messages and phone calls. The amount of personal information required in order to create an invoice is just ridiculous: number employees I have, how much my business makes annually, etc. These are required fields in order to even use the app. The categories for your type of business are in a drop down menu of which none applied to my line of work. There is no option to enter "other" and you can't continue until you select one.

No support ads after paying a year subscription I have years of Invoices i cant see. Just a total of each. I do deliveries. I add prices for different things and no way can I add them all to a list. The fees are just added to the invoice. I have no way to see them for deduction. I was just told by support to feel free to delete the cr-app. What trash. It will be deleted. And this is what you get from a foreign app provider. You are supplying some unknown with your personal information.

Not Free!! Not even cheap. I will probably end up using a paid service, but not from these liars. *the entire app is unusable without purchase. Other services have add ons but offer a base service which can be tailored to fit the individuals needs. Your app is misleading and wastes people time, and what did you do with my business info after I set up the app and found I only got 1 free invoice after I created a sample invoice?

The app works great, and it is definitely what I was looking for as a handyman, the only thing I wish they can do, is to make items sortable or arrangable on the invoices and estimates. For example, if I add an item on the invoice, I want to be able to move it up or down the list depending where I want my customers to see it. Other than that, I love it.

Generic app with greedy billing. You pay monthly for invoice credits, but if you don’t renew, they erase the unused ones you already paid for — no rollover, no warning. I paused during a slow period, not canceled, and still lost them. Customer service? Useless. They don’t care or try to understand. There are way better apps out there. If I could give 0 stars, I would. This is a scam for part-time users. Do NOT recommend.

absolutely incredible. I've used it for my business for 3 years now. it makes your business look very professional to your customers. it can keep up with your receipts pictures taxes everything. you can set up direct payment your processing company so when you send it to your customers through text or email they can pay with a card straight through it. only thing is they have increased their monthly subscription every month the past 3 or 4 months. hopefully they don't continue to do so

The worst in involving App! Mind you, after paying over $60 a year, customer service is poor, you cant even comput an excel spreadsheet for all invoices without losing information. Even with the new update you cant even have clients pay via credit, debit, paypal because it dosen't work! I've given them a year to get this right, yet no change. Just more bull via chat customer service. Update 08/14/21 app has went down three times in the last month leaving me without being able to invoice

I needed a free invoice maker. This one is really nice but not free. If you have a small business on the side like I do, I wouldn't recommend it. It gives you a few free clients, and you are able to send one invoice. Hard work goes into our businesses and you should be up front that there are limits for your app. Not cool. Monthly subscription required!

I've had this app for about 10 years. I loved it. Recently, they forced me to upgrade if I wanted to send more than 10 invoices per month. So, I upgraded to an annual plan. Google play processed the payment and Invoice Simple says they did not get the money. $218 just gone, and Google will not refund me. I'm stuck with the monthly limited plan. Their app support is all AI now, it's TERRIBLE!!!. This is theft!!!

I hate this invoice app! The amount they charge to process payments is disgusting! Especially considering that you already pay a monthly fee. They keep approximately $15 on a $400 dollar transaction, and STILL make you wait AT LEAST three days before getting it into your bank account! If other payment apps, such as Zelle, cashapp, Venmo, and PayPal can do it MUCH quicker and much cheaper, then this company has no excuse. I am currently looking for one more reasonably priced.

Ok I really love this app, and I love paying $5.99 per month for UNLIMITED invoices, what would make it even greater is if I could save my signiture. It would save me a bit of time to just create a signiture once and use that one for every invoice. If there is a way to do that, please let me know. Otherwise this app rocks! Seriously, i can save client info AND item info! Also maybe allow me to save the same photo and description to every invoice as well! this would save time too!

Really liked the app until I realized it wasn't free. Easy to create estimates, invoices, and import logos. Just starting a side business and can't justify the subscription at this time. Disappointed since I already added some information to the app and created a couple of estimates. I guess its back to pencil and paper.

The app navigates, very user-friendly.If I would change anything, it would be a portion of the add client, I often duplicate clients unknowingly until I notice them multiple times on the contact list-then it is too late, invoices are already constructed. I haven't found a way to merge account with exact names. I would love to see a selectable link to view invoices within a client summary list. The ease of the app is great, well worth the subscription. I only have suggestions, no complaints.

Great software. I use it on an iPhone, iPad, and a Galaxy Note S20 Ultra. All work great. I love that I can use my paid subscription on all devices without having to buy multiple times. I can generate an invoice for a client in 30 seconds including emailing it to them, then I'm alerted when they look at it. I also love that this software is simple - it's not trying to do anything it doesn't need to. Its not bloated, it just does a few things extremely well. I really have no complaints!

I was told in a reminder message my price was going up to $59.99 anaully. Now its telling me $199.99 annually for unlimited invoices. Which was a feature I already had for a cheaper price. Been using this program for 5 years. What a shame with the price hikes and little to no upgrades/changes on anything. When I first started using this app in 2020 is was $19.99.

The only issue is when i send the client the invoice via text, many clients have not received the bill. So i am going on with business as usual for a little over a month. I go to perchase orders for inventory and can't because my account was too low in funds. That can't be. So i do done research find out clients had not paid. I contacted clients, and they all responded with "well we never was able to open the link you sent." This has to be fixed so i can we work. This is a nightmare.

This app has been working well for almost a year and around October, 2021 it constantly glitches when trying to write the body of an email. I have used this extensively for almost a year and now I can't even write an email with the quote or invoice. Soooooo frustrating!!!! I even tried to install it on another phone thinking maybe my phone was the issue. But on that phone, the app will not even stay open!!! Just kicks me out and closes the app so now I am sure something has gone wrong !!!

This app is great for anyone with a small business or side business. It does have a small monthly fee to use, but well worth the money. This app allows you send bids and invoices. It keeps track of your paid and unpaid invoices, and keeps track of the total amount sent out in invoices and how much you have made. It is very easy to use and figure out. This app does more than i have said. A big 👍to the developer. I would absolutely recomend the app to others.

DISAPPOINTED you only get 3 free invoices. I just blew a whole days work. I don't mind paying for an app as long as it works and does everything that I need. Doesn't accurately calculate taxes or discounts No AutoFill. I was one of the first to use this app and it was awesome offered a free downgraded ver now you get 3 invoices then boots you FYI $6.99 a month $4.99 a month or $59.99 billed annually. Wish I would have known this up front. Was perfect for my small business

I've used Invoice Maker off and on for over 3-4 years now. I have a small business that doesn't need to invoice as often. It would be nice if you had a way for someone like me to use your services without having a monthly fee. I only tend to need to make an invoice 4 maybe 5 times for the whole year. Other than that I love your template and being able to add my logo and itemized statement. Keeping track of who's paid and who hasn't. An customer service is number 1! You really can't beat that!

The (large) company I do contract work for loves this app... they wish every contractor would use this platform. However, they compress the photos to a point where they are too blurry and compleyely useless. I have tried to include my expense recieps and its a lost cause... I have to send them in a seprate e mail and is a pain for everyone. You guys are great but need to fix this!

Recent changes made things worse. They've released a desktop browser interface for the app (good) but they've decided that use of it requires a subscription upgrade (bad). I've never seen an additional paywall just to use the browser app. Next, the app now supports PayPal integration (good) but you cannot dismiss the "notification" to enable it (bad). I do not want PayPal, stop nudging me to turn it on. That is an ad in a paid app. Last, I was told by support I would need to have multiple accounts and seperate subscriptions to have invoices in different currencies, something Invoicely just supports for free (last straw). I understand the need for revenue, but the app is now price compareable to solutions that are more feature rich and have more usable free editions (like Invoicely).

As it always goes, this started out to be a good app. Now they are pushing your customers to pay when they get their invoice which sounds like a good thing. But they are also pushing this payment system when you haven't even set it up. You and your customers will be truly confused. Even though they are selling this product to businesses they do not have a customer service phone number. Average response on text is 3 to 4 hours.

Do not do the basic package. it is a scam. It says you get 3 invoices per month but I have now had 3 different months where it would not let me send one until it resets. read the fine print! it is set up so you upgrade to the more expensive package. nobody can tell me why. they have no customer service! you are not a priority unless you pay $150/yr

I've been with this app several years, and all of a sudden, they say I'm on a legacy plan that now only gives me 3 invoices per month unless I upgrade. I'm already paying $94 a year plus extra fees. They waited until I renewed last November and didn't share this with me until now when I currently started having issues. As a refund, there is no early cancelation refund thru the google playstore.

The description of this app does say it only lets you make a limited number of invoices before you have to upgrade.. but what it doesn't say is that that limited number is 1. You can make a single invoice and then it requires you to pay money to keep using it. If you want to pay for the app it seems okay, though I couldn't possibly know since I could only make a single test invoice and couldn't do anything else.

This app is super easy to use and very helpful in remembering all your important notes, clients, payment info, dates and more. Best invoice app I have used so far. Was able to make an invoice and send it in 2 mins , usually takes me a longtime to master these invoice apps or they want ridiculous amounts of money. This one isn't like that. Will use agian :)

Don't appreciate that as a paying customer I need to upgrade from $5.99 plan to $9.99 plan in order to write invoices or estimates on my computer. Ridiculous how the $5.99 only covers mobile not pc. Should be the other way around but guess you guys figured that you could strong arm people to get the pc plan since it's more convenient being able to use a keyboard. I've been paying for quite a while now, but this makes me wanna go elsewhere. GL. (USED TO WORK ON PC). BTW. YOUR REPLY=WHAT I SAID.

I've just made the first invoice for my husband's business, and it was fun! He wanted me to type up a bill in an email, but this looks much more professional. It's very handy that I can email or text the invoice within the app. Also nice that my husband will be notified when the invoice is viewed, and I can indicate when it's paid. Unless something horrible pops up, like a $50.00 charge to send the invoice, I definitely recommend this app for anyone with a small business.

Good software, easy to use, easy to convert an estimate to a invoice. Two things though, its actually $100 bucks a yr (they dont tell you that till you are a few invoices in) also, no way to pass on the credit card proccessing fee to a customer when billing them or even split the charge with them. This should be fixed. All in all its a good package. Cheaper than quickbooks but they dont do your taxes or keep your mileage. Customer support seems good, already reached out and welcomed me. 👍

I didn't mind this app until they made me link my PayPal account to it in order to process card payments which turned into a dumpster fire! PayPal wasn't aware of what was going on so it took about 5 weeks to finally get paid. By that time they were holding over 10k and took 3.5%. Invoice simple used to have a button you could turn on so the customer would be paying the processing fee but it NEVER worked and they appear to have completely given up on it because now it's completely gone! RUN AWAY

although the function of this app is great. at the rate they are going I'll be unsubscribing and looking elsewhere. the price goes up considerably every year. on top of that I just got a message saying that some of the tools I have will no longer be available to me. they are moving them to the "premium" accounts and I have to upgrade to continue using them. I'm currently paying double what I signed on to pay originally, and I don't even get all the features that I purchased in the first place!!

This app saved the day for me. My computer crashed and I had no way to print an invoice. I found this app on play store and problem solved. It took 2 minutes for the tutorial to show me how. I already had a printer app on my phone. I was also able to email the invoices from the app and then it notified me when the emails were opened. Piece of mind. :) d Definitely 5 star rating in my book. Thx.

Used to be good paying this app. For free, didn't allow you to send more than 3 invoices and estimates and you aren't able to see if was delivered or read. I started to pay $4.99 and I've got all the benefits. Now, even paying, I lost part of the benefits and if I want, I have to pay $34.99 This is ridiculous. If they want to charge more, I don't mind, since they charge $34 for new signers, not for who it was paying for all benefits already. I'm canceling right now and deleting

I had to move on from this app only because of my issues below. I've sent out several invoices and they are very professional with my company logo on them. What became a major issue for my invoices--- My items are organized by dates/days of the month. Once the date is over I can't go back & add another item so they are in order. Now the date I missed is at the bottom of the page rather than in order. It'll end up below the latest date. Ex: Feb 1...Feb 2...Feb3...Feb 1... :(

This app was working great! However I have been running into problems this month. I was able to send a message to support via the app but now I can't. I had to send an email and I still have not received a response. Which is inconvenient when a client is trying to pay their invoice and the system is giving an error message. That's the whole reason I have this app, to accept payments! I'm definitely not happy right now.

No better way to keep track of invoices new and old, keep track of paid and outstanding all in one app. The only downfall I've experienced is, if your needing to send to more than one email, you have to send the same invoice multiple times. The inv can only be assigned to one email at a time and I have a commercial account that has to be sent to multiple people so that makes my work double the time due to having to input manually another email address and send them to the other offices as well.

I gave this app 5 stars a year ago. I only give it 2 stars now because of the constant harassment with setting up online payments and not being able to disable that feature on the invoices that go out. This causes confusion with my customers. I refuse to back charge them an extra 3.5% as suggested by Simple Invoice. I paid $200 for the premium account, my customers shouldn't have to pay them as well. I will not be renewing my subscription when it runs out.

Great app haven't used it long but is just what I was looking for. I love how I can save my items to reuse for future invoices and estimates. When a customer pays cash I can mark the invoice as paid and it automatically changes to a receipt on the customer end. I can now set items as coupons. This will save so much time. Thank you so much for this app!

Exactly what I was looking for! We started a very small home based business and I needed something to keep track of the orders coming in, and since I wasn't sure how big we will grow to be, I didnt want to buy into a big fancy program. This let's me create an invoice, calculates everything, add notes, and print or email to the customer. I was seriously shocked at how much I can do on a free app.

I am asmall business owner and I've been using this app for a year with no issues at all. Just recently without me knowing my customers were given the option to pay online through my invoices that I'd sent out. They had given their credit card information and the money said it was deposited however I have yet to receive it in my bank account after 6 days. I've sent an email and tried sending several messages to invoice maker with no response back. The money has come out of my customers accounts.

Used this invoice app for years! It used to live up to its name - simple, reliable, fair. Now, in their “upgrade,” they’ve removed features I paid for a year in advance and limited my invoices. Changing a paid plan mid-term? Ridiculous. It’s like buying a car and getting it downgraded halfway through. After years of loyalty, I’m done. “Simple”? More like simply greedy.

It's a very simple and easy to manage app. I used it for the invoices and the estimate mostly. The customer love to recibe my invoices since they look profesional and clean. I think if they could add that we could put more than one email, since sometimes I need to send it to multiple people but I been able to manage. I haven't used the payment with card but I wish they have other options not PayPal maybe Venmo or others... Thanks for the app is great.

The app seems fine; however, I find their pricing and description of the limitations of the free version to be unnecessarily vague and lacking transparency. The app description says the free version "can be used to create a limited number of invoices." How many? Per month? Total? (3 total). Website says core value: "Be transparent. Nothing hidden. Be honest and open in everything you do." In app purchases from $2 - $324 and a *lack* of transparency is why I can't trust sub price of $5/mo.
