playStoreReviews.text: Creating a profile was extremely stressful. Each time I tried typing my shop address, the field wouldn't click and would just open Google maps, and when I try to go back, it takes me back to the very beginning. The "use location" feature wasn't helpful either because it kept getting my location wrong. It ended up taking me almost 10 minutes to complete a process that should be done in less than 2. Overall it's a decent functional app, although I don't enjoy the random popup messages

I enjoyed this app till April last year when the trouble started And since then now I have tried all I could to contact the right person that can fix the issue and it seems like no way. The issue started started with writing (we are unavailable in ur location) each time I tried to login to my account which I have installed the app and reinstall it and the same thing keep reoccurring till now.

I don't understand you people and your app anymore, you will order items from the app worth sixty something to seventy something and you proceed to book order you will see some items written below minimum order, and for this reason you won't be allowed to book the order, in fact your app is frustrating at times, please look into it.

Nothing good to report about this app. Every update creates more frustrating problems. Now you guys have added fraud to the app functionality. You're duplicating payment invoices, expecting your customers to pay twice for goods not delivered. Your customer care no longer responds to calls and you delete histories of messages sent to you to clear evidence. Business is never done that way. Refund my monies or else

I kept wondering the kind of developer who is in charge of this App.... 1, After placing an order, you can't view the things you ordered. 2. When you order 4 items, 2 would be delivered with excuses. 3. Each and everyone have his/her account manager. The person know nothing. Even when you message him on WhatsApp, he won't respond. And when you try to call to make inquiry, the response you will get is just like they were not trained. 5. Please remove the credit facility whatever. It's not working

Your app have A lot of errors, your customer service are unprofessional, you will send a complaint to them instead of looking into the complaint they will reply without preferring solution, your poor attitude to your client will make you loose clients. Spent 6minutes listening to songs just to speak to an agent and your whatsapp platform whoever is responding to client should be trained. Zero product knowledge. I am so displeased with your app. Good radiance.

Ever the introduction of pin before logging in, this app has been a thrash,it won't allow finish ordering goods before went blank. Thrash Something is wrong with these app, it's has been telling me to update for the past one month, unfortunately its give room for updating, I can't access my account...

It's so annoying that when i procced to checkout it is telling me about a minimum delivery value being less than and also what's the need of splitting different product when its all the same thing you ordered. And another thing is the customer care service doesn't reply at all.

I installed the app as usual and signed up successfully, I then logged out to do something real quick, only for me to notice I can't login again. I'm stuck at the "input phone no to continue to acc" section. It just keeps rolling till infinity. Please work on this asap.

I have downloaded the app but can't complete my registration since yesterday till now and I can't get the support team to help me out with it, the WhatsApp page that my phone number verification codes were sent from,I have complained to them by chat messages but no response. Please address this issue please, everytime I want to register, it will verify my email, when I input my phone number, they'll send me verification code, i input it but it gives error messages. I'm stuck please help.

Always asking for updates. Attempts to even update still takes one back to the opening/initial page that has the notice, asking one to update. Telling someone to delete and reinstall all the time is frustrating. On whose data? Imagine always deleting and installing an app that's over 18MB. Shame!

It is the worst wallet app I've ever seen and I'm advising you guys to be mindful of the amount of money you trust with the app. Their response to complaints is damn too slow. I recharged my Dstv via this app last night and the responses says transaction failed and I was debited for the recharged amount plus the N100 charges and since then I've been trying to contact them for a redress but up till now no response has been recieved from their end plus they don't have a customer care number.

Your network is always having issues. For instance, it's been saying I should update my app and I have been trying to do so since morning without success. Also try to look into customers complaints and find a way of settling them. It boosts customers trust on you.

My best shopping app ever✌️ but serious improvement still needs to be done on d app. Orders tracking, unavailable items should not be displayed on the app and more products should be made available for sales. Detergent hasnt been available since last year, what is happening 🥴

I've been trying to login my account but not able to and I called customer care in fact the first person that picked up was super rude and the other people would pick up and promise to fix the problem and call back but they never call back. For any of you who remember the old game pipe dreams, this is not it. It's the worst water plumbing game I've played to date. You have a bunch of pieces scattered haphazardly throughout the board. You can't place new prices, you can only spin ones already there. And the worst part is that there is a timer on the right side of the board. It doesn't reset per level. You just see how many levels you can get through before it fills up. So you'll never beat the game. Plus the ads. SO MANY ADS. Skip this one.

Very good game to waste time. And quite challenging. Graphics are great too. But I have a little problem. Sometimes I failed to reach 3 stars in challenge mode and I repeat the level to gain 3 stars. But, even though I've already got 3 stars (and shown in the end of the level), many times (when I close the level and go back to the main page of challenge mode, world 1, 2, etc) it only display my previous achievement in the pipe, not the 3 stars I should have gotten. Hope you improve this soon. Thanks for the game.

Even though you may have created multiple paths, the game does not remove all of the pieces. It also glitches on multipliers...if there are multiple multipliers in a path, it might pick the lower multiplier. (It should multiply them, for an added bonus!)

Fun game that will challenge your problem solving skills. Levels get progressively harder to a point, then you can figure out patterns that make solving levels easier. Some of the levels have more than one solution but it will only give you credit for the games predetermined solution. So if you find a different solution the game does nothing. This happened on several of the harder levels (90+). Then I had built up over 10k coins and they just all disappeared. Oh and an overkill of ads.
